programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty wants to adopt the boy with Down's Syndrome. A custody battle occurs with the biological parents.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: For the Love of Larry
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark rescue victims trapped in a car, thanks to a helpful dog.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Another Kind of War, Another Kind of Peace
programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.
programme.sub-title: Another Kind of War, Another Kind of Peace

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: That's Our Dad
programme.desc: A children's-show host has a warm-hearted TV persona but is actually a cynic at heart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love at Second Sight
programme.desc: Another angel is upset that Jonathan has been assigned to find a mate for his widow.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love and Marriage - Part 1
programme.desc: Bickering couples go on a trip to learn what it was that brought them together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love and Marriage - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work to keep the three couples together.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: New Year's Eve at Leopard's Den. Alice has returned, but the stress of combining work with caring for baby Bobby is causing tension between her and Danny. Liv is furious that Fatani hasn't told his mother about their relationship.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: Danny is having second thoughts about the wisdom of uprooting his new family and ploughing all their money into a business venture that they know next to nothing about.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Work To Do
programme.desc: A successful giraffe capture means everyone is in high spirits, until the arrival of Evan and Olivia's real father, Simon, throws the family into turmoil.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Meerly Evan
programme.desc: Evan lets the mischievous meerkats loose in Rosie's room to cause havoc. Rosie is devastated when they destroy an irreplaceable photograph of her mother and rages at Evan. She decides once and for all to go back to Bristol.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Evan Meets Elli
programme.desc: Rogue young male elephants are rampaging through Leopard's Den and destroying everything the family have built, so Danny introduces a matriarch elephant in the hope that she will calm them down.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Dawn Feeling
programme.desc: At a typically rowdy family breakfast, Rosie is excitedly looking forward to the arrival of her friend Izzy, whilst Danny is concerned about the rumour of ivory poachers in the area. Unnoticed, Miranda the lion cub pads off into the bush.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Trevanions have been living at Leopard's Den for over a year. The wildlife is roaming freely and the family are settled into African way of life. Business however is not good. With an abundance of game lodges competition is fierce.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: It's the grand reopening of Mara and a British wildlife charity is using the event to release a vulture back into the wild. Fatani, the new, young and ambitious manager of Mara has hired Danny as the vet to oversee the release.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Leopard's Den is looking after a sick and orphaned baby elephant called Togo. However, despite Evan and Du Plessis' constant vigil, Togo is dying from a broken heart. Evan is distraught and Du Plessis promises they will look after her together.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sarah's absence couldn't have come at a worse time for Leopard's Den. Nature Conservation is carrying out their annual inspection and everything has to be tip top. Danny's determined they pass with flying colours and everyone is roped in to help.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Everyone's excited at the prospect of Leopard's Den's new arrival. Bash, Danny's old tutor and Rosie's Godfather, is coming from England to help Danny grow his veterinary practice.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: The Trevanions are delighted when Fatani asks Danny to take an aggressive hippo off his hands. As they prepare for its arrival Sarah gets a bit of a shock when her mother Caroline beats the hippo to the post.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Business is looking up at Leopard's Den but Sarah is feeling agitated. Caroline thinks it because Simon, her ex husband and Evan and Olivia's Dad, is arriving from England to get married. But Sarah has other things on her mind.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny is undertaking a drugs trial at Leopard's Den. But de-worming wildebeest isn't Caroline's idea of fun. She hates animals and finds the whole business mind-numbingly boring.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: Du Plessis is in a foul mood. It's his 60th birthday and he has no intentions of celebrating it. But the Trevanions have other ideas and Caroline is organising a surprise party.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: All is quiet at Leopard's Den as Sarah, Evan and Olivia gather at the hospital. Danny has been given the all clear to go home. But Du Plessis is still unconscious and seriously ill. Caroline keeps a tender vigil at his bedside.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: New lodges nearly break the family, but they learn that it's the animals which make Leopard's Den a success.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny needs an assistant but fails to see that she's right under his nose; Sarah finds out that she needs her mum.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead On Target
programme.desc: A young father-to-be is shot dead in broad daylight by a single bullet fired from afar. At the crime scene, Kenda recognizes the hallmark of a skilled sniper.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: When firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment, homicide detective Joe Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a army solider. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda most infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lockdown
programme.desc: When a crazed gunman terrorizes his neighborhood, officers put themselves in the line of fire to restore order.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff’s deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight--then he’s found dead in his patrol car the next morning.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Sex, Lies, and Surveillance Tape
programme.desc: A confrontation between enemies turns deadly, and Lt. Joe Kenda’s best hope for answers lies with a grainy, dubbed-over surveillance tape.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Jekyll & Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A community is shocked when Antoine McKenzie is brazenly shot outside an auto parts store in broad daylight. The only lead left for Lt. Joe Kenda is a final message written in the victim’s own blood.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Pop Goes the Witness
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Willie McCarty is found at the base of a staircase. Neighbors direct Kenda to a truck spotted fleeing the scene, but a surprise visitor at CSPD turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: various dogs and Chuy, Jack & Carmine
programme.desc: When several tenant's canines can't seem to get along, Cesar is called in to restore peace to a dog friendly complex. Cesar meets two feuding Chihuahuas and a Jack Russell Terrier.
programme.sub-title: various dogs and Chuy, Jack & Carmine

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Harley, Annabelle and Memphis
programme.desc: Cesar gives three socially awkward pups some boundaries: a Lab in constant movement, a shrieking Australian Shepherd and Weimaraner with an eating disorder.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Joe, and Penny, Roxy, Rico, Lou, & Solomon, and Promise
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is so devoted to his owner that he breaks leashes to be with her; a neurotic beagle makes trouble for a pack of foster dogs; and an Italian mastiff puppy fears riding in cars.
programme.sub-title: Joe, and Penny, Roxy, Rico, Lou, & Solomon, and Promise

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Dexter and Nasir
programme.desc: A Chicago art teacher wants to unify her adopted Rottweiler/shepherd’s dual personality. Singer Patti LaBelle is afraid of her guard dog, an aggressive 150-pound South African boerboel.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella & Big Boy, and Gracie
programme.desc: Marley and Me author John Grogan gets a new yellow Lab. Just like Marley, Gracie needs lessons in respect. Paul Frank Industries lets employees bring their dogs to work.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Buster, Holli, and Spike & Belle
programme.desc: Cesar cures Spike's depression with a new friend. An 8 year old blue heeler/Australian shepherd mix, is supposed to play the role of family alarm dog, but he does his job a little too well.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella
programme.desc: After being boarded for 5 months, American bulldog Bella evolved into a food, people, and dog aggressive pet. Owner Nate is scared he will have to euthanize her if her behavior doesn’t change.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Widow’s Dogs, Drool Dog, Dexter Follow-up
programme.desc: A retriever mix, and wire hair fox terriers siblings, have turned into a combative pack. A Sharpei/Dobie mix drools excessively. Rottie mix Dexter travels to Los Angeles for a refresher course.
programme.sub-title: Widow’s Dogs, Drool Dog, Dexter Follow-up

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar's Worst Bite
programme.desc: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tigger and Dan
programme.desc: Cesar comes in to help twins with their biting Chihuahua-Pomeranian mix. A Labrador retriever quickly takes to training to become a hunting dog but has a growing aggressive streak.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Roxie & Foxy, Charlie, and Bubba & Lucky
programme.desc: Two Dachshunds are overprotective of their owners. A couple wants to keep their biting Lhasa Apso. A couple working from home calls in Cesar for some canine conflict resolution.
programme.sub-title: Roxie & Foxy, Charlie, and Bubba & Lucky

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Miles and Maxie & Booker
programme.desc: Former Guns N’ Roses drummer, Matt Sorum need help controlling his ten month old French bulldog Miles’ aggression. And then, can Cesar clear the name of a dog who killed its sibling?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella & Jordan
programme.desc: “Bella Angel” is a devil in disguise. She bites anyone who comes near the house or the family. Jordan, an English Bulldog, jumps up and down, licks people incessantly and is obsessed by skateboards.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Min Pin turns ferocious. Actress Denise Richards' pug gets overprotective and aggressive towards visitors. A stubborn Bassett Hound has to literally be dragged places he doesn't want to go.
programme.sub-title: Chip, Leo, Hank, Lucy and Betty

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sugar, Dax, Nixa, Pete, and Snowflake
programme.desc: Feuding German Shepherds vie to be top dog; Beagle has proven to be anything but sweet; Judi's Bichon Frise has forced her out of her own bed for fear of being bitten in the middle of the night.
programme.sub-title: Sugar, Dax, Nixa, Pete, and Snowflake

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cujo and Molly
programme.desc: Both Mary Jane and her lab-mastiff mix, Cujo, get help tackling their challenges. And Jack Russell mix Molly learns to adapt to her working environment.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tillie and Leo
programme.desc: A rehabilitated Wheaten Terrier mix grows overly attached to his rescuer. The owners of a Shar-pei must deal with the result of their dog’s growing aggression towards other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Lotus, Rocco, Hootie
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace in a spiritual home after Lotus doesn’t live up to his tranquil name; A lesson on keeping dogs safe from venomous wildlife; The return of Hootie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: On a Los Angeles beach, a team of lifeguards led by Lieutenant Mitch Buchannon saves lives, deals with personal tragedies, fights crime, and participates in extraordinary adventures every day.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Moonstruck Beach, Healing Hands, Aspen Sunny Side, Night Walker, Hot Car.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Rock and Roll Ears, The Bucket, The Bridesmaid, Voice from the Grave, The Chess Game.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Witness to Murder, Roulette Wheel, The Phrenologist's Head, The Bridge, The Cigar Box.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Needle Point, Toy to the Rescue, Mystery Lock, The House on Baker Street, The Train.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Bright Light, Magic Mightyman, The Student, Scribbles, Count Mystery.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Rip Van Kitty/Grabbity/The Big Catnap
programme.desc: Garfield sleeps for twenty years and awakens to a strange future./Roy convinces Wade that the "law of gravity" has been repealed./The arrival of homemade cookies signal a "cat and mouse" game.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Great Getaway/Scrambled Eggs/Hansel and Garfield
programme.desc: Jon tries to getaway by going to New York only to find Garfield stowed-away in his suitcase./Sheldon gets mixed up with a turtle egg./Garfield tries to entertain Nermal by telling him a fairy tail.
programme.sub-title: The Great Getaway/Scrambled Eggs/Hansel and Garfield

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Sludge Monster/Fortune Kooky/Heatwave Holiday
programme.desc: Jon, Garfield and Odie spend the night in a spooky hotel./Orson tries to convince Wade that fortune cookies aren't accurate./On a hot summer day, Garfield brings out the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: One Good Fern Deserves Another/The Goodie-Go-Round/Health Feud
programme.desc: Jon mistakenly buys a man-eating fern./Orson tries to get a record player for Bo./Jon becomes a health and exercise nut.
programme.sub-title: One Good Fern Deserves Another/The Goodie-Go-Round/Health Feud

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Legend of the Lake/Double-Oh Orson/The Black Book
programme.desc: Garfield lectures a group about a famous water voyage./Orson imagines himself a famous secret agent./Jon gives Garfield his "little black book" to hide.
programme.sub-title: Legend of the Lake/Double-Oh Orson/The Black Book

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Discomfort of Strangers
programme.desc: Margaret fears that her relationship with Bob is getting stale after they have a petty argument.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween. It is also Bob father's birthday and his mother wants to celebrate by visiting his grave. Bob is not comfortable with this and tries to get out of it.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: No Trouble
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Trouble with Mummy
programme.desc: Bob is concerned when he hears that his mother's best friend Pearl has passed on.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Fly on the Wall
programme.desc: Feeling belittled by his family, Bob jumps at the chance to be the subject of a fly on the wall documentary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Problems
programme.desc: At her clinic one-day, Margaret sees an old school chum, and invites her and her husband Matt to dinner.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A New Life
programme.desc: At a creepy chiropodist social night, Bob and Margaret encounter a couple who are rapturous about the new planned community where they now live.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Party Politics
programme.desc: Margaret runs into a distant friend who asks her to have an Ann Summers-type party in her home.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Fish at the Bat
programme.desc: Bob gets cajoled into joining his office softball team.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Over-Exposed
programme.desc: Margaret accidentally picks up her neighbour's photos at the pharmacy.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Cottage Country
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret get invited up to the cottage of Dr. Yoselheiffer, President of the Canadian Council of Dentists.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Undefined Border
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret go cross-border shopping in the United States.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Age Before Beauty
programme.desc: Margaret gets a new hairstyle but Bob doesn't even notice.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Binky Gets Cancelled/Show Stoppers/Cutie and the Beast
programme.desc: Binky the Clown loses his show and gets a job fixing up Jon's house./The farm's talent show is disrupted when Orson's brothers show./Nermal thinks it is no longer the "world's cutest kitten."
programme.sub-title: Binky Gets Cancelled/Show Stoppers/Cutie and the Beast

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Lasagna Zone/Sleepytime Pig/Yojumbo
programme.desc: When Garfield has an accident on the new satellite antennae, he ends up in the TV./Orson Can't get to sleep./Jon decides to learn karate.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Pros and Cons/Rooster Revenge/Lights! Camera! Garfield!
programme.desc: Garfield sets out to con a con./After an especially cruel trick Orson decides to get even with Roy./Garfield is spotted by famed film director Fredericko Fettucini.
programme.sub-title: Pros and Cons/Rooster Revenge/Lights! Camera! Garfield!

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Polecat Flats/Hogules/Brain Boy
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield misadventures at a dude ranch./Orson imagines what Hogcules would do./Jon visits his cousin.

programme.title: On the Case: Spreadsheet of Terror
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in the Columbia River, police wonder if she was the victim of an accident or suicide. But the evidence reveals it was the beginning of disturbing murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Circled by Vultures
programme.desc: A tourist takes a photo of vultures in Joshua Tree National Park and inadvertently discovers a gruesome homicide.

programme.title: On the Case: Field of Nightmares
programme.desc: A young mother and son are found shot to death in a quiet Texas field. Would a mysterious bag left at the crime scene hold the key to catching their killer?

programme.title: On the Case: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in broad daylight with her toddler just a few feet away. Police have little to go on except the bizarre description eyewitnesses have given them of the brazen killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Notes From a Killer
programme.desc: April 1st 1988. It was a cloudy afternoon when 8-year-old April Tinsley left home for a play date. Janet Tinsley never could have imagined that would be the last conversation she would ever have with her beloved daughter.

programme.title: On the Case: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: An 18-year-old woman is murdered the night before her college career is about to begin.

programme.title: On the Case: Salt in the Wound
programme.desc: An independent young woman starting out in life on her own, becomes the victim of a bizarre and vicious homicide in her apartment.

programme.title: On the Case: Darkness After Dawn
programme.desc: After a newlywed is found murdered in her bedroom, a search is launched for the killer that will last for three decades.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A young woman's mysterious murder sends detectives on a heartbreaking search for the truth.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Town
programme.desc: Paula Zahn examines how police raced to track down a vicious killer on his deadly cross-country journey.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: A man calls 911, saying his wife had been shot when she walked in on a robbery, and that he had used deadly force on the intruder. The investigation of what seems like an open-and-shut case of self defense reveals the secrets of several past murders.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in the Sun
programme.desc: When Kenny Baker returns home, the backdoor is ajar and his wife, Kathy, and two-year-old son, Ryan, are nowhere to be found.

programme.title: On the Case: A Ray of Darkness
programme.desc: Police must connect two vicious murders in order to bring a single killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?
programme.desc: When a young minister's wife is found dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. But then, another member of the congregation is murdered. Police begin to wonder if its just a coincidence or a calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: One of Us
programme.desc: A young records clerk at the Seattle police department is murdered on her way to work her overnight shift. Can police find the evidence to catch the killer of one of their own?

programme.title: On the Case: Last Dance
programme.desc: A woman's walk home from a night out at a dance club ends in a brutal murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Racing to Justice
programme.desc: A talented chef's abduction is the impetus for what will turn out to be a chilling homicide investigation.

programme.title: On the Case: A Slip of Fate
programme.desc: A woman is found clinging to the guardrail of a steep embankment. She tells police a harrowing story; two men had attacked her and her husband at gunpoint and now he is missing. Was it a robbery gone wrong or part of a far more sinister plot?

programme.title: On the Case: Over The Edge
programme.desc: Police are called to the scene of what appears to be a tragic car wreck in the Blue Ridge Mountains... But as Investigators examine the crash site they realize Wendy Kratzert's death was no accident.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing in a world which looks like Purgatory, the Sliders find a war raging between earthlings and Kromaggs and are recruited against their will to fight.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The weary Sliders are nursed back to health in a monastery run by a group of people who are recording civilization's achievements to help future generations.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing in a totalitarian world, Mallory (Robert Floyd) is paralyzed by a laser beam hit but later joins a commune of healers who alter him with a glittering liquid.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Maggie (Kari Wuhrer) is kidnapped and deposited in a processing center while trying to get food from a vending machine owned by a company that dominates the world.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders arrive at the conclusion of a political rally and Maggie (Kari Wuhrer) becomes involved in a wild scandal involving the president (guest star Eric Pierpoint) of the United States.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land in a world very reminiscent of the Roaring '20s and confront Rembrandt's evil double, who deals in bootleg coffee.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing in Maggie's (Kari Wuhrer) hometown, the Sliders discover that her double was a decorated astronaut, presumed dead from a mission to Mars.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land in a world where internal combustion engines are outlawed; Mallory (Robert Floyd) falls for an employee (guest star Lisa Akey) of a major gas company and leader of an outlaw biker gang.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) has hallucinations about Wade (guest star Sabrina Lloyd) and eventually enters a vortex that leads the Sliders to a Kromagg military complex where she is being held.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders arrive at Oakwood Institute, which appears to be a sort of mental hospital.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Fast-food workers in clown costumes chase the Sliders to a resort where Maggie (Kari Wuhrer) is traumatized by a sadistic, virtual reality Civil War game.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After being dumped in the middle of the Pacific ocean, the Sliders are rescued by a merchant ship populated by a band of pirates.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders must pull off the heist of a precious gem that they need to fix their malfunctioning timer.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders discover Los Angeles under a desert and Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) is worshipped as an ancient deity.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: An energy barrier threatens to consume everything in its path as the Sliders rush to prevent Mallory (Robert Floyd) from being transformed into their nemesis, Dr. Geiger (guest star Peter Jurasik).

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 1.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 2.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders race to find the cure for a deadly plague that is consuming the inhabitants of that dimension. Guest stars: Yee Jee Tso, James Bell. With Jerry O'Connell and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders must find a solution amid the chaos when they land on an Earth in jeopardy of being destroyed by a meteor. Guest stars Gerry Narin and Jason Gaffney. With Sabrina Lloyd.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley
programme.desc: A double axe murderer and no clues - except tiny flakes of paint discovered deep in the wounds of one of the victims. This is a story of how forensic science - and the determination of one detective - found the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley

programme.title: Killer Britain: Levi Bellfield
programme.desc: For years police suspected Levi Bellfield of crimes including sexual assault, GBH and abduction, but there was never enough evidence to charge him. Then they began connecting him with the murders of young blonde women.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Peter Morgan
programme.desc: Millionaire Peter Morgan moved a young mother, Georgina Symonds, into one of his properties, paying her thousands a month to be his ‘girlfriend’. But when the relationship turned sour, he began plotting his revenge.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Barnyard
programme.desc: A hog farmer claims his wife fell on a four-pronged rake and died - but there is a hole in his story and his wife's body holds the clue.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder Under A Blue Moon
programme.desc: Each episode of Murder Masterminds immerses viewers in the emotions and mystery of a homicide, using interviews, recreations and dramatic police dash/body cam videos to tell a tale of murder and deception.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Killing Momma
programme.desc: The story of Gypsy Lee Blanchard. Confined to a wheelchair and lavished with gifts from charities, everything changed when her mother was found dead and Gypsy vanished.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Nuneaton: Katherine Kelly explores the senseless murder of 15-year-old Naomi Smith and how a series of breakthroughs and DNA evidence led police to her killer.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Grimsby: Katherine Kelly looks into the 2011 murder of Adam Vincent, a killing so brutal it sparked North Lincolnshire's biggest police investigation in over a century.

programme.title: Murdertown: Barnsley
programme.desc: In 2015, a 69-year-old man is found stabbed in his home. At the scene, forensics uncover a receipt from a nearby cashpoint. CCTV at the bank reveals a woman using the victim's card to withdraw cash. Who is she? And how does she relate to the murder?

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Greenock: Katherine Kelly examines the 1986 murder of 16-year-old Elaine Doyle. One of Scotland's longest-running murder enquiries, it took 26 years to find her killer.

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Darlington: Katherine Kelly explores cannibal killer David Harker. One of the UK's most disturbed psychopaths, his crime rocked Darlington, causing a second horrific murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Lorraine Thorpe hit headlines as Britain's youngest female double-killer. But more deaths were about to rock the Suffolk town. Katherine Kelly explores.

programme.title: Murdertown: Tamworth
programme.desc: In 1994, a gang kill a woman who manages a building society and tie up her husband, before robbing the building society of large sums of cash. But despite making a tearful plea for help, the injured husband’s story doesn’t tally.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dundee
programme.desc: Aged 15, Robbie McIntosh walked into a fish and chip shop to announce that a woman had been killed on the iconic Law Hill. Police revealed the victim had been stabbed dozens of times. But they never imagined that the culprit was the teenager.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: The Mark Of The Bell Witch
programme.desc: The Mark of the Bell Witch tells the terrifying true story of the Bell family of Adams, Tennessee—haunted for nearly five years by an apparition bent on destroying their lives and killing the patriarch, John Bell. Discover the truth behind the legend.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Cloning
programme.desc: Disturbing experiments in animal cloning go on behind closed doors and human cloning may soon be a reality.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bigfoot
programme.desc: The evidence for Bigfoot piles up, causing some to wonder who has been keeping information from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Anti-Christ?
programme.desc: Every culture and religion on the planet believes that an evil one will usher in the end of days. But who is this Anti-Christ? And how can we hope to stop him?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: If technology goes too far, too fast, a time may come when humans are no longer at the top of the evolutionary food chain.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Stargate Portals
programme.desc: Discover doorways to wormholes in time, their secret locations around the world, as well as who is trying to open them and why.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top 10 Conspiracies Of All Time
programme.desc: Those in power have secrets they do not want average citizens to know.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Fake World Leaders
programme.desc: Fake World Leaders: Are Hitler, Saddam Hussein and Osama Bin Laden really dead? Experts find proof that several infamous world leaders didn't die when you think they did.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Alien Wars
programme.desc: Has our government been at war with alien aggressors for the past half century? Startling evidence indicates that the US military has been under attack and has kept it from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Time Travel
programme.desc: Evidence suggests that time travel may have occurred in the past.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Nazis Today
programme.desc: For decades, there have been rumours key members of Hitler’s inner circle escaped the fall of Berlin - maybe even the Führer himself. But where did they go and what is their plan?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Alien Attack
programme.desc: Secret satellites. Death stars. The weaponisation of outer space. Are governments the world over preparing for an alien attack? And if so, why are we being kept in the dark?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top Ten Secret Societies
programme.desc: An elite group of power players may be plotting the fate of the planet. Discover the secrets behind ten powerful hidden organisations around the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Government Warehouses
programme.desc: From Fort Knox to Hangar 18 and Camp Hero, discover a series of top-secret and high-security national database centres.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Global Depopulation
programme.desc: Disasters, famine and pandemics threaten civilisation on a global scale. A cataclysmic event may spell the end of civilisation and the human race could face extinction.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Discover America's new killer aircraft and the out-of-this-world technology the US military uses to conquer the globe.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Doomsday
programme.desc: There have been doomsday signs and prophecies for centuries, and humans' time on this planet may be nearly over.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bio Hazard Island
programme.desc: A secret government facility may have created many of the diseases currently plaguing the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Mind Control
programme.desc: There are those who wish to control what others think, how they act and what they believe. Discover the new practices in mind-control.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: New World Order
programme.desc: An elite group of power-brokers may be trying to rule the planet.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Alien Attack
programme.desc: Secret satellites. Death stars. The weaponisation of outer space. Are governments the world over preparing for an alien attack? And if so, why are we being kept in the dark?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Zombies
programme.desc: This episode explores what would happen if a zombie outbreak ever became a reality.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Haarp
programme.desc: Governments around the world may be using weather control to incite the next World War and possibly destroy the planet.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Apache Sitgreaves National Forests
programme.desc: Apache-Sitgreaves National Forest: A trip through the ginormous forest in Arizona. Strange encounters rumoured to have happened there include an alien abduction.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Grand Canyon National Park
programme.desc: Grand Canyon National Park: A strange series of events in Grand Canyon National Park leads researchers to speculate whether its power comes from forces that cannot be explained.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Everglades National Park
programme.desc: Everglades National Park: A plane crash in the Everglades National Park leads to strange hauntings - and some believe the park may exert a dark, transformative power

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Hawaii Volcanoes National Park
programme.desc: Hawaii Volcanoes National Park: The Hawaii Volcanoes National Park is the site of strange events. Are they linked to the legendary Native Hawaiian Goddess of the Volcano, Pele?

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Joshua Tree National Park
programme.desc: Joshua Tree National Park: Are UFO sightings at Joshua Tree linked to an anti-aging machine and a powerful creature called the Yucca Man?

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Glacier National Park
programme.desc: Glacier National Park: In Montana's Glacier National Park, some claim that there is a hidden underground Nazi base that may even have been the final hideout for Hitler himself.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Mount Shasta National Forest
programme.desc: Mount Shasta National Forest: From inexplicable disappearances to mysterious experiments, events in Mount Shasta National Park may be explained by an ancient Karuk Indian legend.

programme.title: Moesha: The Play Scene
programme.desc: Mo writes a scene from a play set in a Blues Lounge in the 1940s for her English class, and our cast acts it out for us.

programme.title: Moesha: Use Me Once – Shame On You – Use Me Twice I’ll Kill Ya
programme.desc: Mo tells her friends at the Den that Hayley’s dad is an important record executive.
programme.sub-title: Use Me Once – Shame On You – Use Me Twice I’ll Kill Ya

programme.title: Moesha: Keepin’ It Real
programme.desc: Mo is attracted to a classmate she is working with on a project.

programme.title: Moesha: Halloween Part 1 – Kim’s Revenge
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy decide to dress as “The Women of Batman” for Halloween.

programme.title: Moesha: Break It Down
programme.desc: Frank takes Hakeem to the father/son “lock-in” at the local church, to encourage open communication and trust between fathers and sons.

programme.title: Moesha: Rhythm Dues
programme.desc: Mo encourages CPQ to submit their latest song to the local radio station for their “play it or stuff it” segment. When the song is played, it is well received. Q has written lyrics over a Morris Day song, and Morris shows up at “The Hole” where he plays.

programme.title: Moesha: The Double Date
programme.desc: Mo has been dating Bridgewood classmate Jeremy since her break up with Q.

programme.title: Moesha: He Ain’t Heavy – He’s Dee’s Brother
programme.desc: Mo gets a crush on Dee’s very attractive younger brother when he comes to visit.
programme.sub-title: He Ain’t Heavy – He’s Dee’s Brother

programme.title: Moesha: It’s My Paper And I’ll Cry If I Want To
programme.desc: Mo decides to publish her own Bridgewood newspaper when editor Mary Ellen refuses to add her to the staff of the existing paper.
programme.sub-title: It’s My Paper And I’ll Cry If I Want To

programme.title: Moesha: The “Short” Story
programme.desc: Mo’s group at the Den includes a short kid known as “Biggie”.

programme.title: Moesha: She’s Back
programme.desc: A famous female broadcast journalist who used to be friends with Frank speaks at Bridgewood, so Mo invites her to their house for dinner.

programme.title: Moesha: This Time You’ve Gone Too Far
programme.desc: Mo, Kim, Hakeem, Niecy, Morgan, Marco, and Chris head off on a road trip to San Diego.
programme.sub-title: This Time You’ve Gone Too Far

programme.title: Moesha: Body Language
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy play a game of “Truth or Dare”.

programme.title: Moesha: Model Employee
programme.desc: Rather than asking Frank every time she wants something, Mo decides to get a part-time job at the Class Act where Hakeem works.

programme.title: Moesha: Pajama Jam
programme.desc: Mo asks Frank if she can go to a slumber party at Morgan’s house.

programme.title: Moesha: Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money
programme.desc: Moesha wants to get cable and her own phone now that she has a job and is making money.
programme.sub-title: Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money

programme.title: Moesha: A House Is Not A Home
programme.desc: Moesha is living with Andell after having moved out of Frank & Dee’s home.
programme.sub-title: A House Is Not A Home

programme.title: Moesha: Moesha Meets Brandy
programme.desc: Moesha meets Brandy at a concert and we discover that Moesha is having a romance with Aaron, a college student.

programme.title: Moesha: Homecoming
programme.desc: With a little help from Myles and a visit from Grandma Mitchell, Moesha moves back home and returns to Crenshaw High.

programme.title: Moesha: Hello! What’s This?
programme.desc: Dee finds a joint in the couch while cleaning the house. Frank and Dee assume and accuse Mo, but Moesha is shocked when she catches Myles smoking.

programme.title: Moesha: Psyche Your Mind
programme.desc: Based on the family turmoil, the family begins counseling, but Moesha doesn’t want to air the family’s 'dirty laundry'.

programme.title: Moesha: Teacher
programme.desc: Moesha is attracted to a substitute teacher at Crenshaw. After they kiss, he leaves the school for 'personal reasons'.

programme.title: Moesha: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are stalked by a student who was just released from jail who they haven’t seen since the third grade when he got into trouble because of them. Parody of Brandy’s feature 'I Still Know What You Did Last Summer…'
programme.sub-title: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade

programme.title: Moesha: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are invited to a college to attend a Prospective Freshman Weekend and someone slips a 'roofie' in her drink. Her boyfriend Aaron keeps her from being taken advantage of.
programme.sub-title: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College

programme.title: Moesha: Birth Control
programme.desc: Moesha gets birth control pills when she decides she would like to lose her virginity to Aaron. However, things get complicated when Dee finds the pills in her purse.

programme.title: Moesha: A Class Act Christmas
programme.desc: Moesha, Hakeem, and the other employees of the Class Act are held hostage by a man dressed as Santa Claus protesting age discrimination.

programme.title: Moesha: The Crush
programme.desc: A friend of Myles who has a crush on Moesha pretends he cannot read so she can tutor him. However, after an article she writes about the success she has had with the little student is published in the LA Times, Moesha learns a hard lesson.

programme.title: Moesha: Barking Up The Wrong Tree
programme.desc: Hakeem accepts a job as assistant manager of the Class Act claiming there are financial difficulties at home. Moesha, concerned about his college education, confronts his mother who denies his claims.

programme.title: Moesha: Life Imitating Art
programme.desc: Racial tensions mount in Moesha’s high school after a mural depicting Latin American hero Caesar Chavez is purposely defaced.

programme.title: Moesha: OhMiGod, Fanatic
programme.desc: After Moesha and Kim have a huge fight, Moesha is surprised when MTV shows up at her door to film her bringing her best friend Kim to meet her favorite singer. Leanne Rimes guest stars.

programme.title: Moesha: The Rite Stuff
programme.desc: Moesha wants to boycott her debutante ball when she learns one of the girls is thrown out of the ceremony because she is pregnant.

programme.title: Moesha: I Love Moesha
programme.desc: When Moesha is once again rejected from her friends’ band, we enter a black and white parody of I LOVE LUCY wherein Lucy (Moesha) tries to get into Ricky’s show.

programme.title: Moesha: Home Is Where The Car Is
programme.desc: Moesha is disappointed when she is not appointed valedictorian of her senior class. She discovers the boy who has been appointed is homeless.
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Car Is

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In
programme.desc: At a slumber party, Moesha and her friends reminisce (with clips from past episodes) about the past four years together.

programme.title: Moesha: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Kim’s mother, Nikki, is re-entering a journey she started 18 years ago. With Dee’s help, she will be completing her education to receive a high school diploma.

programme.title: Moesha: Had To Be You
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha: The Prom
programme.desc: Moesha’s date for the proms cancels at the last minute. She goes unescorted and meets a handsome mysterious boy who disappears at midnight. She tries to find him, but to no avail.

programme.title: Moesha: A Concerted Effort (Part 2)
programme.desc: Mo cries the lovesick blues on a phone-in radio show. The DJ, feeling sorry for Mo, gives her four free tickets to an upcoming concert.

programme.title: Moesha: The Regulations Of Love
programme.desc: Kim unintentionally lands a boyfriend while trying to make Hakeem jealous.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: North Leeds
programme.desc: From two young first-time buyers looking to settle down to a family who have been scarred by a previous purchase, this search challenges Kirstie and Phil in ways they never anticipated.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties & North Yorks Revist
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Trudi & Steve were moving to be closer to family-whilst in Luton, Zena wanted to get out of mum and dad's.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Glasgow
programme.desc: In Glasgow is first time buyer project manager and property obsessive Adam. With a budget of £250,000, he's looked at 500 properties in the 9 months!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Southbank
programme.desc: We have a teenager with an epic budget keen for independence; and a young couple with high hopes that their funds will stretch to the dream flat. Kirstie and Phil are on their home turf –can they secure a famous victory?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sheffield, Windsor Revisits
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkies Deborah and Justin Beeley had more stuff than they could cope with while Matt Rushworth's entire life could be squeezed into his well travelled backpack. Could Phil and Kirstie find fitting homes for both of them?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Derbyshire
programme.desc: This week Phil and Kirstie are searching in Derbyshire, where their first couple Bryone & Daniel Burton have moved from London, along with daughter Ruby.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Hertfordshire
programme.desc: Martine Wright and Nick Wiltshire met in 2003 and are getting married in just two months' time.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit: Sheffield
programme.desc: A year after two troublesome searches, Phil heads back to Sheffield to see how a couple of doctors and a firefighter are faring.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Bucks
programme.desc: With both sets of house hunters determined to have it all, Kirstie and Phil are going to have to use all the tricks of the trade if they're going to help them move forward and hopefully into the house of their dreams!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week, we're back in Yorkshire catching up with lotto millionaires Roger and Lara Griffiths. Just over a year ago, this lucky pair scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and were desperate to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bristol & Avon
programme.desc: This week they're in the South West of the country taking on two sets of hapless house hunters.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Brighton, Sussex
programme.desc: A first-time buyer after a perfect pad near the Brighton hot spots and a couple who know exactly what they like-and exactly what they don't...

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bath
programme.desc: This week we're back catching up with Sadie Yukon and Simon Gwillian, a picky pair who really put us through the mill.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Norwich
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are called to the rescue of faint-hearted first time buyers, Helen and Paul. Scared off by serious-sounding surveys this hapless pair have loved and lost their dream home no less than three times in the last twelve months.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Jersey
programme.desc: This week we're on Jersey hunting for a fabulous family home for the young couple Nick and Katrina. We show them the many highs and lows this Channel Island has to offer.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit: Hastings
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil revisit two couples in Hastings, Jakki and Scott, and newlyweds Nicola and Chris, only to find that one couple is now in a very different place.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit 2: Jersey/Warwickshire
programme.desc: This week we're going back to visit two very different sets of house hunters who had one thing on their minds – space, and they wanted lots of it!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wiltshire
programme.desc: One couple want room for 4 children and a 4x4 business -whilst the other want a place that will 'give them a big hug' whenever they walk through the door!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Midlothian
programme.desc: Professional rugby player Matt and girlfriend Amy have been giving the property market a try for over a year but so far, have failed to score.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Brighton
programme.desc: Armed with the house-hunters' requirements, laptops and a surgical link to their mobile phones, Kirstie and Phil blitz the market looking for that perfect new place.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Northside
programme.desc: Kirstie's house hunter is London born and bred and has viewed a whopping 90 properties already-whilst Phil's couple have yet to view a single place and have no idea where to buy.

programme.title: Dynasty: Body Trouble
programme.desc: Blake gives Jeff one-third controlling interest in Denver-Carrington, postponing Adam's plans to gain sole control of the company; Blake and Krystle meet with Dr. Hampton to begin tests, while Blake tells her the true reason for her severe headaches.

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis in Blunderland
programme.desc: Suspecting her accountant has worked with Sean to ruin Colbyco, Alexis faces the reality she may lose her empire; receiving bad news from her doctor, Krystle asks Fallon to gather the family.

programme.title: Dynasty: Every Picture Tells a Story
programme.desc: Surrounded by those she loves, Krystle resolves to live; Fallon takes the picture of Blake and the dead man to the morgue, unaware she is being watched; Accusing Blake of killing him twenty five years ago, Alexis vows to avenge his death.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty: Ginger Snaps
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful as she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty: Delta Woe
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath. Toying with Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tankers, Cadavers to Chance
programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their families secret.

programme.title: Dynasty: Clear the Dex
programme.desc: Alexis hires a mercenary to get her ships back; Adam and Jeff exchange blows after accuses Adam of being disloyal to Blake; Dex begins to doubt Alexis can ever offer him the kind of love he needs.

programme.title: Dynasty: Virginia Reels
programme.desc: Sable tries to convince Blake she is on his side. Dex is attracted by her loyalty; Sammy Jo's interest in Tanner McBride intensifies; Dex attacks Adam after learning he took advantage of Virginia; Joanna becomes jealous of Sable's interest in Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty: House of the Falling Son
programme.desc: Sable persuades Heath not to kill her. Upset by her close encounter with death, she goes to Dex for comfort; Alexis goes to Paris to keep an eye on Boyd's commando operation to retrieve her oil tankers. Seeing a little of Dex in Boyd.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Son Also Rises
programme.desc: Blake resumes control of Denver-Carrington and fires Adam; Joanna accepts Adam's offer to work for him and Alexis; Zorelli confesses his love to Fallon, but she remains confused by her feelings toward him.

programme.title: Dynasty: Grimes and Punishment
programme.desc: Alexis gets her revenge on Sable when she tells her tankers have sunk; Alexis is devastated when she discovers Dex slept with Sable; as Sammy Jo becomes increasingly fond of Tanner McBride, she is unaware that he is married.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sins of the Fathers
programme.desc: Alexis is emotionally crushed by Dex's affair with Sable; Blake tells Dex and Sable beneath the lake is a Nazi treasure and his father killed Grimes to prevent him form exploiting it; Adam tries to win back Blake's trust so he can spy for Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: Sable unleashes her lawsuit against Alexis; Dex dives into the hidden vault beneath the lake and finds it empty; Zorelli tracks down the uncle of Dominique Devereaux, learning he knows something about Grimes' murder; Alexis leaves for Switzerland.

programme.title: Dynasty: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Blake is a suspect in Elsworth Chisolm's apparent murder; Zorelli is put back on the Grimes case; Charles Matthews warns Blake that Zorelli has been asking him questions about Blake's father.

programme.title: Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: Jeff and Dex meet with Roger Grimes' wife and learn he has a son; Sable is pregnant and unable to tell Dex that he is the father; Adam has a picture of Jeff and Monica retouched to appear incestuous and then submits it to a sleazy tabloid.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blast from the Past
programme.desc: Charles Matthews tells Blake a grim secret; Zorelli finds a bug hidden in his apartment; Alexis tells Monica that Jason Colby isn't her father; Alexis learns she has a Fredrick Stahl original and realizes Blake's deep, dark secret.

programme.title: Dynasty: Cache 22
programme.desc: Alexis threatens to sue Blake for half of the plundered Nazzi treasure unless Sable withdraws her lawsuits against Colbyco. Sable agrees; Krystina leads Fallon to the treasure. They are followed by Dennis Grimes.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.253
programme.desc: A man is suing his ex-girlfriend’s son for allegedly stealing his dog and for purposely ramming his car with his bicycle. A loan to pay life insurance, the return of property, and alleged harassment are disputed by ex-lovers.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.146
programme.desc: A man denies popping the tires and smashing the truck windows of his ex-girlfriend’s new boyfriend’s vehicle in a jealous rampage. Ex-lovers accuse each other of having drug problems during a fight over an alleged loan for a motorcycle.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.195
programme.desc: Slashed tires are the end result when feuding neighbors share adjacent parking spaces. Fake diamond earrings, serious bouts of jealously, and dueling restraining orders come into play when ex-lovers fight over an unpaid loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.217
programme.desc: A woman's Disneyland trip after a concussion weakens her lost wages claim. Another woman discovers her fiancé's hidden child while he's incarcerated, leading to property disputes.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.75
programme.desc: Young man admits to being drunk and possessing marijuana but denies throwing rock through woman's window. Man cares for injured mother after father's death; fight over credit card debt and estate divides them.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.244
programme.desc: A woman sues the father of her two daughters for half of his tax return. Another woman's son is killed in a hit-and-run by a drunk driver, dividing former friends over a loan made from the insurance settlement.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.122
programme.desc: Woman and niece sue niece's ex-friend over wrecked Jeep Commander/injured woman sues for nude photos posted online/woman sues estranged daughter-in-law for loan to recover repossessed car.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.254
programme.desc: A teenager sues her sister for a loan to pay car insurance and credit card charges. A man demands payment for an Oldsmobile Alero repossessed by his ex-girlfriend. Another teen sues an ex-friend for assault during an argument over missing property.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.178
programme.desc: Two women fight at a Halloween party over wearing the same costume, disputing their relationship with the Sheriff’s department. A woman crashes her co-worker's car into oncoming traffic, admitting she was driving without a license.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.175
programme.desc: Man accused of cheating for 10 years alleges friend vandalized his car. Woman accused of violently kicking car while witnessing couple making out inside.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.165
programme.desc: Man sues ex over alleged false restraining order; denies gun threat. Mother with concerns about son's spending keeps his money.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.191
programme.desc: In a divorce battle, a woman loans $2,000 for legal fees. A karate school owner sues a motorist over a collision impacting business. Teens and moms dispute a traded Ford Mustang's value.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.188
programme.desc: A troubled teen is at the center of a dispute between a woman and her son-in-law’s daughter over the cost of two airplane tickets to Pittsburgh. A woman sues her son-in-law’s granddaughter for money loaned to buy a mobile home.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.98
programme.desc: Woman alleges ex threatened son's jail over Subaru. Intoxicated men, post cage fighting, cause injuries, lawsuits.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.60
programme.desc: "Labeled as a “sperm donor” instead of a father by the mother of his child, a man insists that he wants to be involved in his child’s life. They fight over a loan to secure a home."

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.50
programme.desc: Man alleges assault by ex-fiancée, sues for damages and unpaid loan for her schooling/Former live-in lover sues estranged husband for over $4,000 in personal loans and child support.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.155
programme.desc: Man blames ex-girlfriend for loss of business, belongings, and child care. Ex-girlfriend accuses him of assault and theft. Woman tries to access ex-boyfriend's bank account for $5,000 surgery bill reimbursement.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.120
programme.desc: A woman and her teen daughter accuse an estranged relative of assaulting them at a family party/A woman is suing her former friend for repossessing her truck; her friend argues that the vehicle was never insured.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.81
programme.desc: Woman claims assault while trying to retrieve Glock 23 bought for boyfriend; ex-lover says gun was gift. Children accused of crashing into neighbor's parked vehicle while riding bikes in street.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.46
programme.desc: Man defends against ex-girlfriend's claim of unauthorized use and damage to her Buick Regal, insisting it was a hit-and-run/Woman sues former friend for allegedly stealing belongings stored in her garage.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.32
programme.desc: A fight over an engagement ring, a damaged SUV, and airline tickets further divides ex-fiancées/Former best friends fight over a computer and whether it was a Christmas gift or a loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.208
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute ownership of a snow blower, weight bench, and alleged loan. License plate found in damaged car from a crash, but alleged party denies responsibility.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.180
programme.desc: A 66-year-old analyst for the U.S. Department of Defense claims he was intimate with a 27-year-old sports bar worker and that she owes him money. She denies his claims.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.197
programme.desc: Woman sues child's father for PlayStation III balance and harassment. 'Good Samaritan' sues former friend for student loan balance.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.256
programme.desc: A young woman sues ex-business partner for investment return and legal fees. Another sues ex-friend for VW Jetta balance, disputing key handover. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for utility bills, deposit, and debt.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.247
programme.desc: Alleged abuse of a seven-year-old boy, unpaid loans, and shared living expenses are disputed by ex-lovers. A loan to buy work clothes, a broken lease, and unpaid child support come into play when former lovers fight over money.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.92
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute loan for motorcycle repair trade school, laptop cost, and apartment repairs. Man sues friend for car damage; she admits drinking and letting someone else drive it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.110
programme.desc: Custody of a beautiful, homemade baptismal gown is disputed by entranged family members/While driving with her five children in the car, a woman runs a red light, is arrested and is later sued by her uncle who claims he bailed her out.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.62
programme.desc: Man allegedly smashes ex-girlfriend's stereo in jealous rage; she accused of throwing his leather jacket in rain. Fight continues over parking fines. House sitter accused of trashing friend's apartment, damaging car while out of town.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.185
programme.desc: A woman’s life-long dream to have plastic surgery is fulfilled by her ex-fiancé who demands that he be paid back; a Christmas day fight over child custody further escalates their fight.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.229
programme.desc: A woman denies filing a retaliatory restraining order after finding her ex-fiancé with someone else; accused of kicking his bedroom door. Another woman sued for passing fraudulent check in secret-shopper scam.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.140
programme.desc: Older couple accuses daughter and stepson-in-law of abuse including unpaid loans and theft; young couple denies. Man denies responsibility for drunk driving accident, claims friend knew he was intoxicated.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.257
programme.desc: Road rage after an argument over a man leaves former friends fighting over damages from a car accident. A personal assistant is accused of violent behavior after her decision to quit her job and sue her former employer.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.199
programme.desc: A teen DD falls asleep at the wheel, totaling a car after giving drunk minors a ride. Co-workers moving in together face bed mix-ups, pet issues, and a broken lease.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.250
programme.desc: A teenager's friend faces accusations of drinking, driving, and crashing a stolen golf cart; he blames the teenager's mother for providing alcohol. Two brothers fight over damages to a home allegedly caused by domestic violence.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.151
programme.desc: Neighbors sue over car windshields shot with BB gun. Lawsuit involves ominous chalk drawing of child, invasion of privacy, and harassment in volatile living arrangement dispute.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.107
programme.desc: Woman countersues roommate's husband for sexual advances amid back rent lawsuit/Man denies requesting mother's payments on Audi A6 in lawsuit.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.86
programme.desc: Botched deal to trade babysitting for rent leaves ex-roommates fighting over dumped clothes and unpaid bills. Woman accuses friend of kidnapping her kids during her jail time, refuses to repay dental loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.77
programme.desc: A 16-year-old claims a schoolmate keyed her car; the accused classmate denies all charges/A 12-year-old girl, who is entrusted with a valuable Rolex chain, makes the mistake of loaning it to a classmate; he claims he lost it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.187
programme.desc: A man sacrifices his job and house to move for his girlfriend but faces a broken lease and ring dispute after their breakup. Another man is sued by his child's grandmother for allegedly vandalizing her Chrysler Sebring.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.29
programme.desc: Siblings dispute deceased grandmother's estate, personal property, and damages from alleged mutual assault/Woman sues ex-boyfriend for alleged life-threatening phone call over broken apartment lease, involving alleged marijuana and meth use.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.259
programme.desc: A young tenant disputes custody of a band's equipment and unpaid rent with former landlords. Man sues seller and girlfriend for refund after alleged failed vehicle purchase from online ad.
