programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Beta Kappa
programme.desc: The tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, know that they have to rely on each other to get the job done, but sometimes trusting the competition isn't such a good idea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Three weeks left of bluefin tuna season, the Gloucester fleet is desperate to haul in a monster.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Into The Storm
programme.desc: Bad weather threatens to end the fishing week for the Gloucester fishermen, but while some boats head for home, others decide to take on Mother Nature's wrath.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Operation T.U.N.A
programme.desc: As the hunt for blue fin tuna intensifies, the fisherman resort to espionage for information.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bite Fight
programme.desc: It's the fifth week of the season and the entire fleet battle for the most successful fishing spots.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mission: Fishin!
programme.desc: As Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fleet charges into the heart of the fishing season, it's a tight race for the coveted title of top-earning boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Latitude
programme.desc: It's almost halfway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and the Gloucester fleet has hit a lull in fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle Royale
programme.desc: With the second half of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna fishing season now underway, competition amongst the Gloucester fleet intensifies when tuna become scarce.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Brotherly Shove
programme.desc: A new week calls for new techniques as the Gloucester Captains try unconventional methods to hook their next paycheck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Blue Grit
programme.desc: Time is running out in the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and, this week, every boat in the Gloucester fleet is facing a different challenge.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Beta Kappa
programme.desc: The tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, know that they have to rely on each other to get the job done, but sometimes trusting the competition isn't such a good idea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Three weeks left of bluefin tuna season, the Gloucester fleet is desperate to haul in a monster.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case
programme.desc: On September 12, 2013, Eric Mosser, a 45-year-old heating engineer, discovers his wife Isabelle lying in a pool of blood at their home in Illfurth, Alsace.
programme.sub-title: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school
programme.sub-title: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.
programme.sub-title: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.
programme.sub-title: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)
programme.desc: Laetitia Perrais, 18, a trainee hotel waitress, vanishes after evening service.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: A Cry for Help
programme.desc: Police patrolling the night streets hear gunshots and head to the scene. They find a nude middle-aged man in a parking lot lying face down in a puddle of blood.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Decent
programme.desc: It’s up to Dr. G, along with the National Transportation Safety Board, to piece together how and why a plane crashed, leaving the pilot dead.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Kiss of Death?
programme.desc: After a brief illness, 34-year old Claire Jackson dies suddenly in the hospital from massive liver failure and winds up in Dr. G’s morgue.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Bite
programme.desc: Roy Cambells is found dead and covered with scratches, his aggressive 80lb dog by his side. Dr. G wonders if the dog could have been responsible for the man's death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Dive
programme.desc: A train engineer panics when he spots a man lying on the tracks. He blows the whistle, but the train can’t stop in time. It’s up to Dr. G to piece together how Andy Santana died.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Holiday
programme.desc: While at dinner, Virginia Lowery chokes on a fishbone. Later that night, she suddenly can’t breathe and dies. Virginia’s family hopes that Dr. G can provide them with closure.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Journey
programme.desc: Dr. G reviews a woman's medical records and learns that she suffered from an auto-immune disease called lupus, which might have something to do with her death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: A Deadly Deal
programme.desc: Reed Baley is found unconscious the morning after his bachelor party. Now, it’s up to Dr. G to determine if alcohol was to blame or if there was another cause of death.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hendy-Freegard – The Terrorist Trickster
programme.desc: Dubbed “The Most Evil Conman Ever” by the British press, Hendy-Freegard terrorized victims into believing they were terrorist targets.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hyams – The Suspect Scientist
programme.desc: Hyams posed as a leading scientist and millionaire art buyer before fleeing to California where he posed as a leading academic.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Nick Gage – The Lying Lothario
programme.desc: Fantasist Gage preyed on lonely women he would meet on dating sites.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Flying Bandit
programme.desc: In 1986, an American becomes one of Canada’s most prolific bank and jewellery bandits after he pulls off one of the biggest heists in Canadian history. As more robberies occur, the police become more determined to catch the mastermind behind them all.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Wilderness Murders
programme.desc: Ricky Dale Hemphill and companion Charla Toma set out for a picnic along a river near Brookings, Oregon in the fall of 1979. A day later Ricky is found murdered and Charla is missing.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Allan Legere: The Monster of Miramichi
programme.desc: In 1989, the entire town of Miramichi is held hostage by a monster. A troubled man with a heinous past embarks on a 7-month crime spree, including brutal beatings, rape, arson and serial murder.
programme.sub-title: Allan Legere: The Monster of Miramichi

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Laser Man
programme.desc: During a time when immigration to Sweden was growing, feelings of racism were also on the rise. On August 2, 1991, one man began to act by shooting young immigrants on the streets of Stockholm.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Boardinghouse Killer
programme.desc: Dorothea Puente provided shelter for the infirm in her boardinghouse. It wasn't until a body was found in her yard that authorities realized she was not who she appeared to be.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Lady-Killer
programme.desc: A hunter on the outskirts of Saskatoon, Saskatchewan stumbles across human remains.

programme.title: Crime Stories: A Way with Murder
programme.desc: Nancy, David and Susan Spangler are found shot to death in their home - the brutal slaughter is deemed a murder suicide.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Victoria Day Shooter
programme.desc: On a single rain-soaked night during the Victoria Day weekend, police are called to the scene of three very similar crimes.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: A perfect bank heist is pulled off by an underworld gang In Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: In the sleepy town of Marlborough, where boredom and low pay fuel dreams of escape, a daring heist unfolds in the dead of night.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: In Erie, Pennsylvania, things end horrifically when regional FBI Agent Jerry Clark arrives on the scene of a bank robbery in progress.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: The search for the diary of Alfred Rosenberg, credited with shaping Hitler's ideology, spans decades.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When bank employee Theodore Conrad casually walks off his job carrying hundreds of thousands of dollars in a paper bag, a fifty-two year manhunt ensues.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: In a daring heist at Vancouver Safety Deposit Vault, millions in gold, cash, and diamonds are snatched.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: During a Norman Rockwell exhibition in 1978, seven valuable paintings and a fake Renoir are stolen from Elayne Galleries.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When Quebec's prized maple syrup reserve is mysteriously plundered, detectives must delve deep into the region's syrup underworld to track down the culprits.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When a retired bureaucrat turned bank robber is finally arrested, a long distance friend is stunned to see his face online in connection with a string of bank robberies.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elusive Rapist
programme.desc: In the winter of 1968, the prairie city of Saskatoon is ravaged by a string of savage rapes.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: A woman is badly hurt after being knocked down a bank by her pet goat, a man is found with serious injuries on a remote beach, and 11-year old girl has fallen down a bank and suffered suspected spinal damage.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12
programme.desc: The chopper team is called out to save a motorbike racer who's crashed at 200ks per hour and a woman scalded by an exploding radiator, plus an elderly golfer in a kilt suffers a heart attack on the 18th hole.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 39 year old man has crashed his bike 15 kilometres south of Auckland city and an elderly man has collapsed while walking. He is unable to speak properly and is incorreherent at Waiheke Island.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggle to save a Paeroa farmer.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tropical rain has hit Wellsford, flooding the entire town and leaving a pregnant woman and her unborn child fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: A Glenbrook farmer has been left seriously injured after one of his Highland cows has taken to him with its horns.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: The team are being sent out to a traumatic accident that will end up being rather close to home.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6
programme.desc: The Rescue chopper team is en route to Whitianga to help save a badly injured stock car driver.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: The chopper team are about to take off to rescue a seriously injured man.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper team is responding to a life threatening emergency.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: The team have received a status 2 callout; Mark Lorimer was knocked out and has multiple injuries after being hit head-on by another vehicle.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: The team are called to a road accident where a woman has been cut from inside of her wrecked car.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: The team is responding to a life-threatening emergency. A cyclist in his 60s, Terrence Williams, is unresponsive and critical after an accident 15 minutes flying time from Auckland, near the small settlement of Maramarua.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 4
programme.desc: A motorcyclist is thrown head first from his bike.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 5
programme.desc: The team have little time to save a woman who has collapsed.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 6
programme.desc: Paramedics perform life-saving treatment on a car driver.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 7
programme.desc: A woman is injured after being thrown out of a car.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12
programme.desc: The team are called out to a status 2 emergency; Clark Chamberlain was abseiling when he fell from the top of a cliff to the ground. He's now in a critical condition suffering from multiple injuries.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggles to save two young men who are feared drowned at Hahei; a Coromandel motorcyclist is struggling with punctured lungs, and young man is trapped inside a car after a high speed accident.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: A teenage motorcyclist is fighting for his life after crashing on a remote farm near Warkworth, a man has 2nd degree burns to his face and hands from an accidental explosion, and four men are missing after two boats capsized on the Kawhia bar.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team battles to save a man trapped in his overturned Land Rover on Rakino Island; a star rugby player at Onewhero may have broken his neck after a scrum collapsed, and a man out cycling on Waiheke is clinging to life after a cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: The Westpac chopper crew attempt to save a Waiheke man who has life-threatening injuries after falling off a ladder and a motocross rider is in a bad way after a 100-foot jump goes badly wrong.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6
programme.desc: The helicopter rescue crew responds to Pauanui to save a truck driver who's smashed through the windscreen after rolling his truck and a Port Charles family is distraught after a young girl is run over by a quad bike.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: The chopper crewmen have their hands full with five badly injured patients after a car crash near Waiuku, and a massive motorcycle pile-up leaves injured bikers all over the road, and a man may have broken his neck after falling from his horse.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: As a weather bomb hits, the chopper crew set out on one of the most challenging missions they have ever undertaken 20 miles off shore, a man lays face down at Muriwai beach unable to move.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: A hang glider pilot may have broken his back after a heavy crash-landing, a Manaia man is in a bad way after coming off a sea biscuit at high speed, and a crashed Waikato driver needs an urgent air-lift to hospital to save his life.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: A motocross rider may have broken his back after hitting a tree head on at high speed, at a sawmill a man faces its worse nightmares; and a woman is fighting for her life after taking an accidental overdose of her husband's medication.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: The emergency bikers risk their own lives as they race to save and protect others. In Birmingham the biker paramedics are on the frontline as they deal with the aftermath of football violence.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve Harris finds himself under attack when he goes to the rescue of a teenager in a fight.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Trained to deal with anything, the biker paramedics find themselves dealing with a suspected stroke when a fishmonger collapses at market, a man’s hit crossing the road

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: There's a report of a stabbing for Birmingham's biker paramedics. In Essex, a driver tries to sweet talk his way out of trouble.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kenny and the Jet
programme.desc: Paige's maternal side goes into high gear when Team Scorpion must save an unconscious, a hypothermic boy stuck in the wheel well of their airborne airplane.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Lie in the Sand
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Northeast Africa where they must carefully navigate a minefield in order to save the lives of local villagers.

programme.title: Scorpion: Pilot
programme.desc: When a crisis at LAX leaves dozens of airplanes unable to land, the government enlists a team of misfit geniuses to save the day.

programme.title: Scorpion: Single Point of Failure
programme.desc: The Governor calls on Team Scorpion when his daughter is mysteriously "bio-hacked" with a deadly virus and has only 24 hours to live.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Cyclone
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is determined to prove their worth when a bomber threatens to take out the internet infrastructure of the entire Southwest.

programme.title: Scorpion: Shorthanded
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Las Vegas for a simple casino job, but a robbery leads to Walter's arrest and the rest of the team is left to clear his name.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

programme.title: Scorpion: True Colors
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day
programme.desc: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online.

programme.title: Scorpion: Risky Business
programme.desc: Team Scorpion enlists the help of a musician who created a controversial algorithm that generates hit songs to help find the murderer of a music blogger.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rogue Element
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help protect Cabe's ex-wife after she uncovers evidence that suggests foul play in the death of a prominent congressman.

programme.title: Scorpion: Talismans
programme.desc: When a military plane is shot down in Bosnia, Team Scorpion must help recover its stealth technology before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Scorpion: Revenge
programme.desc: When Sylvester accidentally triggers an explosive device during an investigation, Team Scorpion must focus on finding who's responsible even while their friend's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dominoes
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he gets trapped in a beachside cave and drowning is imminent.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

programme.title: Scorpion: Charades
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is tasked with uncovering a mole inside the CIA whose judgment is clouded by matters of the heart and is being coerced into stealing deadly chemicals.

programme.title: Scorpion: Forget Me Nots
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must jog the memory of an injured former Secret Service agent who is their only hope of preventing weapons of mass destruction being launched from a secret U.S. nuclear silo.

programme.title: Scorpion: Love Boat
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on a cruise ship to locate and disable deadly stolen rockets.

programme.title: Scorpion: Going South
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Mexico when a tech billionaire hires them to rescue his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Scorpion: Once Bitten, Twice Die
programme.desc: When a conflict in Eastern Europe threatens to escalate, Team Scorpion is called on to help facilitate secret peace talks to prevent World War III.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Megatron's Sword
programme.desc: Tidal Wave sees Megatron's sword.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The New Cybertron City
programme.desc: Super Optimus Prime emerges to find his team searching for Energon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Megatron Resurrected
programme.desc: Megatron is alive again and forces Scorponok to serve him, but Scorponok is loyal to only one master Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Megatron Raid
programme.desc: Megatron launches his first Energon raid since his resurrection.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Starscream the Mysterious Mercenary
programme.desc: Alpha Q has revived Starscream, whose mission is to destroy Optimus Prime, to regain a new body.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Battle of the Asteroid Belt
programme.desc: The Autobots go into the asteroid belt to see what is going on after seeing something on radar, and find parts of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Energon Tower
programme.desc: A new Autobot weapon is revealed that unleashes vast destruction to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Legend of Rodimus
programme.desc: Alpha Q prepares to bring Unicron to life, while yet another Energon Tower is secured into place.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Crisis in Jungle City
programme.desc: Alpha Q is not ready to let Earth go without a fight, and sends a group of stealth Terrorcons, named Command Ravage and Blackout.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Kicker Beware
programme.desc: Megatron forces Demolishor to divulge the Autobots' secret of finding energon: Kicker.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Energon Grid
programme.desc: Megatron has taken yet another plan, to create three meteors from Unicron and propel them at Earth before the energon grid has been completed, which he feels will “strike fear in Optimus Prime.”

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Rodimus: Friend or Foe?
programme.desc: While Snow Cat tests his power against the Energon Grid by sending frozen asteroids, Megatron decides to go after Alpha Q instead of Earth after finding a Terrorcon spy.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Go For Unicron!
programme.desc: Optimus reveals their mission is twofold: they are also going to destroy Unicron, and they prepare to set up a space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Return of Demolishor
programme.desc: The Autobots face a new threat: for Demolisher is revived in a new power, who is tougher than ever.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Tale of Two Heroes
programme.desc: The Autobots continue on their journey and intercept a Decepticon warp signal which turns out to be Rodimus's ship. Rodimus asks permission to aboard and Optimus obliges.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Battle Stations
programme.desc: The autobots continue their planning on taking out Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Alpha Q: Identity
programme.desc: Unicron's arrival causes the Decepticons on Cybertron to rebel, while Kicker learns the truth about Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Laser Wave: Rampage
programme.desc: Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, while Kicker tries to convince the Autobots to listen to Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Survival Instincts
programme.desc: Starved for Energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Each One Fights…
programme.desc: Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers, and allow Unicron to “feed” on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Unleashed
programme.desc: Megatron uses the Energon to revive Tidal Wave into Mirage.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Open Fire
programme.desc: As the Autobots fought their way to Megatron within Unicron's body and with Megatron throwing everything at them, Alpha Q provides support by fighting for the control of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ripped Up Space
programme.desc: Limping to join with the rest of the Autobots, Optimus Prime is confronted by Shockblast, who plans to take out Optimus Prime to prove that he is superior to Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Team Optimus Prime
programme.desc: Megatron escapes into a black hole and Optimus Prime decides to give chase, even though he doesn’t know what he will find on the other side. Kicker joins his Autobot friends on their mission and pilots the Miranda II into the black hole.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Protection
programme.desc: On the other side of the rip, the Autobots must now defend a whole new set of planets, and Wing Saber finally gets the chance to re-capture his prisoner Shockblast.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Imprisoned Inferno
programme.desc: Shockblast has been captured and temporarily imprisoned on Iron Planet. Inferno is left to stand guard over Shockblast while the other Autobots are on Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Team Bulkhead searches for the Autobots, while Kicker and Ironhide search for Inferno on the Jungle Planet. Inferno, who was previously affected by the Decepticons into embracing the dark side, is saved by Kicker after learning of a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Bulkhead
programme.desc: The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet, but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Farewell Inferno
programme.desc: Inferno uses his Decepticon “half” to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Crash Course
programme.desc: The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Omega Supreme
programme.desc: Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Heroic Battle
programme.desc: Unicron gets his head back. Alpha Q dies in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Power
programme.desc: The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor. Meanwhile, some very interesting transformations are taking place on the Decepticon team…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Optimus Supreme
programme.desc: The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron. All autobots can't save it and almost all of them got wounded from Unicron's attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Perishes
programme.desc: Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ambition
programme.desc: The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron. Optimus Prime and the other Autobots, aboard the Miranda II, travelled to Cybertron to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Wishes
programme.desc: Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon. By immersing himself in the liquid, he is transformed into Galvatron, with a new purple armor which makes him impervious to all forms of firepower.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron!
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's “soul” is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Break Through
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to break through the energon grid and then later have to go underground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Distribution
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A building manager finds the lifeless body of a young woman in her first apartment. The case goes cold, then a new forensic tool examines the old evidence. Will science crack the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A single mum looking for love vanishes without a trace. Foul play is confirmed when a large pickup truck toolbox opens to her body stuffed inside. Can forensic evidence connect the dots?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Navy lieutenant Lee Hartley is murdered while deployed out to sea. Investigators discover Lee had enemies aboard the ship, but it takes years before they discover what really happened.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The 1972 rape and murder of nine-year-old Debbie Lynn Randall, who was abducted not far from her home in Marietta, Georgia, is solved five decades later with the help of forensic science.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Michigan, 1996, a body is found on the side of a road, wrapped in a blanket. The victim is a Sharon Hammack. Detectives use new technology in an attempt to solve this cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is out for a run she is brutally attacked and raped by a stranger. Police use ground breaking genetic genealogy to identify the perpetrator.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mortally wounded woman crawls to call 911. Her husband gets a hard look from police, but claims to have an airtight alibi. The intricate forensic science of ballistics is brought to bear.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Deeply religious Gail Fulton is shot execution style in the quiet suburbs of Michigan. Surveillance reveals it was a trio of killers. Eventually, detectives get a break: a handwritten note.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1990, three sex workers are murdered. A serial killer was on the loose and detectives had few clues. Over 20 years later there's a break in the case - and an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A morning house fire kills the only doctor in the small town of Laeger, West Virginia. An investigation quickly leads to the arrest of Jason Lively, the son of the doctor's long-time nurse.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a hearing impaired 77-year-old on a road trip is attacked by a thief and shot to death, investigators are determined to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives and forensic experts recount the most extraordinary cold cases that were solved using the revolutionary technique of familial DNA testing. Featuring interviews with family members, police and more.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives and forensic experts recount the most extraordinary cold cases that were solved using the revolutionary technique of familial DNA testing. Featuring interviews with family members, police and more.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Police solve the decades-old cold case of Clare Holman through new advancements in DNA technology.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, 19-year-old Janet Stallcup goes missing while on her way to a party. Eight days later, her body is found in her car.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A criminally charged sex offender and murderer attacks in a terrifying rage. This predator evades capture for years, but leaves a critical piece of evidence behind - his palm print.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A massive explosion claims the life of a California farmhand, and authorities think it's an accidental death, but analysis of debris shows it's a bomb; investigators have few suspects until they hear ominous rumours about a jealous rage.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a beautiful college student is stabbed to death in her Knoxville apartment, suspicion immediately falls on her roommate; a bloody shoe print left by the killer exposes a murderer with no history of violence and no reason to kill.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Numerous suspects emerge after someone starts targeting law enforcement officers in a peaceful Texas county.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An Illinois mother and her two young children are brutally murdered in their beds, and lurid threats are spray painted all over the walls of the crime scene.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1978, the body of 16-year-old Krisann Baxter is found in Washington. Investigators try to find Krisann's killer, but don't find any answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1989, Krista Martin's life is tragically cut short because of an intruder. A friend finds her and calls 911, starting an investigation that will span four decades.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Chandler, Arizona in 1991, an intruder viciously sexually assaults a woman in her own home. The case goes unsolved for decades until revolutionary science connects the dots.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1995 in Beaumont, Texas, the parents of Catherine Edwards find her body in her bathroom. The killer evades justice, that is, until forensic science catches up with him.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After police identify a murder victim thanks to her butterfly necklace, they discover that several of her colleagues had vendettas against her.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Three Indiana construction workers are found shot on a work site.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A Texan who vows to live a reformed life after being released from prison is subsequently convicted of murder, despite insisting his innocence, so he uses forensic science from behind bars to try to prove his case.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Ohv
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens set up an operation targeting illegal off-road vehicle usage. We also follow a patrol along the Missouri River, making sure the boaters are safe and legal.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Antler Blitz
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens look into illegally taken antlers. Plus, follow along as they help with conservation efforts for sage grouse and walleye

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Waterfall
programme.desc: Snowfall in Montana make for treacherous waters, but that doesn't stop the annual boat float. Follow Montana Game Wardens as they patrol the rivers to ensure the safety and legal compliance of the boaters.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Snow Cat
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens patrol the high country during winter with snow mobiles. It's also elk season, and the wardens check for compliance with hunting laws.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Litter Bug
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Bitterroot
programme.desc: Opening day of big game season is busy for Montana's Game Wardens. Follow along as they patrol the Bitterroot game area. Plus, the wardens set up a sting to catch poachers, complete with a moving decoy.

programme.title: Wardens: Antler Raiders
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens try to control the masses as the gates open and antler hunters are set free to find their trophies.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Your Money or Your Life?
programme.desc: The 70s and 80s saw a change in activity for criminal fraternities. Following the sentencing of the Krays, many gangs turned to armed robbery. Villains saw the banks and armoured cars that transported huge amounts of cash as relatively easy pickings.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Live By The Sword
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unwittingly surrounded themselves with criminals. Do these people always deserve the harsh legal consequences and should society turn its back on them for their mistakes?

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Cons to Icons
programme.desc: In the final episode, Bernard O'Mahoney explores the media’s influence on creating celebrities out of criminals. Is it possible to create a gangland persona based purely on false headlines? Yes, but there are certain to be consequences...

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: My Generation
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney looks at the effect of time on gangs and their reputations. Whether it be organised motorcycle groups or Irish travellers, the roots are dying out with every new generation, but how does this affect the older, more traditional members?

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Manchester
programme.desc: One of Manchester's most infamous gangs was “The Quality Street Gang”. The gang was well known for sending the Krays 'packing' from Manchester when the infamous brothers tried to expand their operation Northwards.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Glasgow
programme.desc: Bernard O’Mahoney begins his journey in Glasgow. Bernie meets the city’s first Godfather of crime, Walter Noval, former leader of the XYY gang, who discussed Glasgow’s underworld during the 1950s and ‘60s.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Alternative Ulster
programme.desc: We cross the Irish Sea and the stories take a more political turn. Specifically we explore the infiltration of drugs into Ireland, and the relationship between terrorists, politicians and organised crime.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Die By The Sword
programme.desc: Continuing from episode 5, Bernard O'Mahoney explores the potential injustices suffered by those who have unwittingly surrounded themselves with criminals.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Birmingham
programme.desc: Examining the notorious Peaky Blinders, the flourishing gang culture in the sixties with links to the Krays, and how this culture continues today.

programme.title: Wardens: Across The Seeded Fields
programme.desc: Montana game wardens work the opening day of pronghorn season as they monitor legal and illegal hunting practices, as well as protecting the seeded fields from undue harm.

programme.title: Wardens: Guts
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens deal with the opening day of deer season and all the trouble that goes along with it.

programme.title: Wardens: In The Drink
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens deal with some of the many water issues they deal with including littering, under- age drinking, and the annual Yellowstone Boat Float.

programme.title: Wardens: Warrants & Weed
programme.desc: This week, game wardens deal with repeat offenders and people with outstanding warrants that only make matters worse when confronted.

programme.title: Wardens: Cheeseheads
programme.desc: This week, game wardens are looking for poachers and those not hunting within the law, all with a little help from full size decoys and local citizens calling in to the TIP-MONT hotline.

programme.title: Wardens: Three-Fifty-Seven
programme.desc: This week, game wardens try and track down a potential poacher who took a deer out of season. Then, we'll follow another warden as he takes his son hunting when his son draws a hard to come by moose tag.

programme.title: Wardens: Mercy Kill
programme.desc: Warden Kambic investigates a wounded elk and the hunter who tried to do the right thing.

programme.title: Wardens: Tangled
programme.desc: A wounded deer has locked horns with another buck creating a dilemma for Warden Burroughs.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Rules
programme.desc: Itʼs “back to basics” for 15 Division when Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides itʼs time for his officers to get back on track

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Every Man
programme.desc: A seasonʼs worth of trials and tribulations come to a head during a frenzied night at the station when the distracted rookies improperly search a prisoner

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: The Mist
programme.desc: Trapped townspeople (Thomas Jane, Marcia Gay Harden, Laurie Holden) face monsters inside and out after a supernatural fog engulfs their Maine community.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: A professor (Nicolas Cage) and his son obtain an encoded time-capsule document that lists every major disaster over the past 50 years and predicts a future global calamity.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: Lord of War
programme.desc: A relentless Interpol agent tracks an arms dealer (Nicolas Cage) trying to stay one step ahead of his business rivals.

programme.title: Drive Angry 3D
programme.desc: A vengeful father escapes from hell and chases after the men who killed his daughter and kidnapped his granddaughter.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh sails to America with a priceless white jaguar and a dangerous political assassin. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port of Call New Orleans
programme.desc: A substance-abusing cop (Nicolas Cage) is locked in a downward spiral as he probes the drug-related murders of five illegal immigrants from Senegal.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie police officer (Channing Tatum) who once killed a pair of junkies in his youth remains haunted by the incident.

programme.title: Stan Lee Presents: Mosaic
programme.desc: A young woman (Anna Paquin) uses her newfound superpowers to prevent a villain from raising the dead.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Don't Go Into the Woods
programme.desc: Sydney's friend phones to inform her that he's discovered information on the Golden Hawk of Maribor, lost since 1711. Sydney and Nigel travel to Lubjanka to meet him, but he's already gone.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: French Connection
programme.desc: While on a lecture tour with Nigel in Europe, Sydney is contacted by MI5 because she is the only one who can prevent an impending high-level assassination.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Midnight Flight
programme.desc: Germania, ca. 400 AD: an artifact called Gunther's Scepter is sealed in a vault. Kleine Burgh, 2001: Sydney and Nigel are hired to find it using a crystal and a stone tablet.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Executioner's Mask
programme.desc: When a model's face is disfigured after she puts on the mask of a French executioner, Sydney and Nigel will try and find the tomb to reverse the curse.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Royal Ring
programme.desc: When the British Museum gets Sidney and Nigel to help search at Tudor sites for a ring of King Henry VIII, Nigel is confronted with his self-confident pestering elder brother Preston Bailey.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Set in Stone
programme.desc: In a monastery, Knight Gabriel impales a demon, which then turns to stone. In 2001, Nigel and Sydney arrive bearing a letter from a monk, but the abbot claims it is a forgery and shuts them out.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Ascent
programme.desc: In the continuation of the episode "Descent," an unexpected incident leads Johnny to a new understanding of Walt.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Outsider
programme.desc: Johnny takes on a major corporation to prevent the mass marketing of a drug he foresees will cause terrible birth defects years down the line.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Precipitate
programme.desc: When Johnny is injured and infused with a blood product stemming from six different people, he begins having visions through the donors eyes.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Scars
programme.desc: Johhny's decision to join the re-election campaign of Stillson's (Sean Patrick Flannery) chief opponent, Harrison Fisher (Gerald McRaney) has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Misbegotten
programme.desc: Johnny is kidnapped by three young women who demand his help in solving a murder mystery from the past.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Cabin Pressure
programme.desc: On a flight to Washington with Purdy (David Ogden Steirs), Johnny has a vision of their plane crashing and must convince the pilot and onboard Air Marshall to risk the lives of everyone on board.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Man Who Never Was
programme.desc: A terrifying vision leads to Johnny's involvement with a man (Robert Culp) with a mysterious past who suddenly disappears.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Dead Men Tell Tales
programme.desc: The vision of a hit on crime boss Cathan Donnegal (William McDonald) leads to Johnny's dangerous involvement with the mob.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Playing God
programme.desc: When Johnny is reunited with two close frineds from high school, one of whom is awaiting a heart transplant (Lochlyn Munro), he is tormented by a vision of the other (Ally Sheedy) becoming the donor.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Deadline
programme.desc: Allan comes to Sydney, telling he has 12 hours before a Necron virus kills him unless he delivers Tau to a blackmailer who has the antidote.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Wages of Sydney
programme.desc: Quan Shu, Manchuria 1359 BC: The Chinese invent an explosive gift egg. New York, 2001: A rival beats Sydney and Nigel to a map leading to the Dragon's Egg.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Vampire's Kiss
programme.desc: Lucas Blackmer, a babe-magnet, professor and a novelist asks Sydney to help find Vlad Tepes' lost relic. And he isn't the only one after it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Sydney runs into her ex Gray and goes on a holiday with him to Bali, but when Derek Lloyd shows up to enlist her to find Parvati's Bowl, she can't resist.

programme.title: The Witnesses :Ancient Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Contactee, sighter, and abductee share similar and different experiences with beings from other dimensions, leaving a lasting mark of their presence.

programme.title: 30 Insane UFO Encounters
programme.desc: A review of the 30 most insane UFO encounters for your eyes delight and its up to you to make your own mind up, if these amazing encounters could be the real deal or one big elaborate hoax

programme.title: Alien Invasion: Are We Ready?: Episode 1
programme.desc: Aliens attacking Earth is the stuff of sci-fi stories, but what if it really happened? Top scientists, military strategists and authors war-game an extraordinary alien invasion scenario.

programme.title: Alien Invasion: Are We Ready?: Episode 2
programme.desc: A continued look at how an alien attack could unfold and whether human beings would be able to resist such an attack, either in the short term or in the long term.

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: 30 Insane UFO Encounters
programme.desc: A review of the 30 most insane UFO encounters for your eyes delight and its up to you to make your own mind up, if these amazing encounters could be the real deal or one big elaborate hoax

programme.title: Alien Invasion: Are We Ready?: Episode 1
programme.desc: Aliens attacking Earth is the stuff of sci-fi stories, but what if it really happened? Top scientists, military strategists and authors war-game an extraordinary alien invasion scenario.

programme.title: Alien Invasion: Are We Ready?: Episode 2
programme.desc: A continued look at how an alien attack could unfold and whether human beings would be able to resist such an attack, either in the short term or in the long term.

programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Confessions Of An Alien Abductee
programme.desc: Chantelle, Marie and Simon are all alien abductees. These ordinary people share their extraordinary stories as they seek help through the curiously named Anomalous Mind Management Abductee Contactee Helpline, or AMMACH.

programme.title: UFO Hunters: The Italian Ufologists
programme.desc: Italian researchers explore mass UFO sightings, clipeology, and real testimonies, delving into the history and research methods of ufology.

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Alien Contact: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago a special, genetically advanced race of beings came to Earth. They were seen as Gods by primitive man and worshipped. They set themselves apart.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens : Origin Of Humanity
programme.desc: Increasing evidence and sightings of UFOs suggest contact with extraterrestrial beings who may have influenced the origins of human life.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Question
programme.desc: Join Philip Coppens, star of the History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series, as he provides proof that UFO's helmed by Extraterrestrials from other worlds came to Earth millennia ago.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Nathan banishes his bad luck back tatt. Ollie's wheezy Magaluf inking is sent into orbit.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Emma needs Jay's help with a warning sign. Alice assists Louise with her eye-popping ink.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: The team help Georgie, who had such a wild time with the boys on holiday she commemorated the trip with a tattoo that's left her single ever since. Alice takes on Kelly's animation-inspired disaster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Vicky celebrates her family with an animal tribute tattoo, Abby's cringe-worthy celebrity crush is covered, Jordan needs to lose the ink he got to win an argument, and Adam has a rather personal tatt.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jay covers Jack's offensive nickname tatt, while Sketch sweeps away Mark's cobwebs.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch conceals a large portrait on Les. Alice spreads Becca's favourite food on her leg.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Sketch removes model Kelly's lower-back tattoo. Alice tackles Laim's DIY tattoo disaster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch is monkeying around with Jenny, Joe's Gary Lineker tat gets the red card and Alice fixes Sannahs unfortunate inking error.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Harry wants a memorial tattoo dedicated to a very intimate part of himself after surviving testicular cancer. Matt has doodled on his own legs with a tattoo machine his parents got him for Christmas.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Victoria is in desperate need of a tattoo cover-up so she can train as a teacher. Abigail gets inked at the age of 75, Hollie loses her cheeky chicken ink, and Lisa divorces a big tattoo mistake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch helps Sian cover a clown tattoo that's scaring the life out of anyone who sees it. Jay has to deal with Emma's extremely intimate cat portrait. Daz needs assistance covering a boastful tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sketch rids Ben of a silly spooning tattoo. Jay fixes Matt's backside-based chat-up line.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Alice rids Sammie of an unladylike error, and Sketch erases Lloyd's misunderstood etching.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 5
programme.desc: The pop up parlour in the sun gets a visit from a noughties heartthrob. Glen transforms Dave's shoddy shot glass. Sketch gives Zoe a bespoke design, Alice helps Jodie get rid of a bad decision and Glen rids Max of his unusual love.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 4
programme.desc: At the parlour in the sun, Glen meets drunk tattoo collector Jack. Sketch rids Dylan of a reminder of his past & Jay gives Julie a portrait she can cherish forever.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch hides a Kardashian catastrophe, Alice gives Lana's emoji a facelift, and Jay is moved by a family's story of bravery.

programme.title: 1 Chance 2 Dance
programme.desc: When Gabby is uprooted during senior year, she finds herself split between two boys while having one last shot to make her dance dreams come true.

programme.desc: The girls from The Bikini Carwash Company, (1992) are back. Their carwash company is a success, but to prevent it from being consumed by a mega company, the ladies partner up with a TV lingerie business.

programme.title: 18 Year Old Virgin
programme.desc: In a series of sexual mishaps, a high school senior tries to lose her virginity on the last night before graduation.

programme.title: MILF
programme.desc: A group of nerdy college guys who can't seem to connect with girls their own age discover the excitement of hooking up with sexy older women.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Calahan har en lidenskap for kjoler og Brandy hater dem absolutt. Men med litt, ikke så søt, texansk overtalelse, gir Brandy seg til slutt. Og hun innser at hun elsker mannen som fant veien for å få tilgang til hennes utemmede hjerte.
programme.sub-title: You Make Me Want to Wear Dresses

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Claudia kjører nesten på en kjekk fotgjenger etter å ha jobbet hele natten hun får mer enn hun pruter for når telefonen ringer og det er han som utfordrer henne til en høyhastighetsjakt gjennom de tomme gatene, inn i ørkenen og en ny seksuell oppvåkning.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: En ensom alenemors lidenskaper blusser når hun møter en kjekk drever sent en kveld på vaskeriet. Etter en natt sammen går de hver sin vei som fremmede, men innser at lidenskap er det som får en sjel til å overleve.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: En fordømt engel blir forferdet over å innse at han er forbannet med den forræderske makten til å drepe med et kyss og må gå på jorden alene og borte fra kjærligheten, for alltid.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: En eksotisk øde øy holder en mann liggende alene til en dag en vakker kvinne skyller i land. Netter på stranden tenner et forhold som ingen av dem har kjent før. De utforsker forbudte områder med begjær, skyldfølelse og vill nød.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Alia er øyeblikkets modell. Hun er hot og på topp, men altfor klar over at hennes ungdommelige, nydelige utseende har vært hennes eneste billett i livet, og tiden forsvinner raskt den magien.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a serious headache. In addition, they also buy an old French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team gamble on restoring a Vanden Plas saloon from the 1970s and a child's tricycle from the 1960s. Plus, catch up on the restoration of a rare Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek encourages the team to buy a Francis Barnett Plover at auction. Plus, the wheels come off the restoration of an MG Metro.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek thinks a 29,000-mile Ford Capri should be kept original. Plus, a Hercules women's racing bike from the '50s.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a solid-looking 1969 MGB for the team to consider purchasing at a Mathewsons classic car auction. After winning it, the car is sent to a father-and-son team for restoration.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Dave alerts the team to a 1979 Lotus Esprit S3. The car is a thoroughbred classic that desperately needs a proper restoration, but it's also an expensive purchase that risks not paying off.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team pays tribute to mid-80s Midlands by breathing new life into what was once the fastest production MG ever made: the Montego Turbo.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewson's advice on what to restore.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team restore a 1988 Golf GTI Convertible, a wooden launch boat, and look at a Mk1 Austin Mini.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super-rare Renault Clio Williams 2 in F1 blue with contrasting gold alloys turns Dave Mathewson an interesting shade of green.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team snap up a slightly saggy Seventies Saab 96. Despite a stunning restoration, it could result in a record financial loss when it goes to auction.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team purchase a 1950's Austin Westminster rally car in the hope that seasoned competitor Dave Mathewson can win a race.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Old Byron Hot Springs in the Californian desert, a once glittering Hollywood hotspot, converted into a top-secret interrogation centre.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a work of national pride that became a symbol of excess in the Turkish capital of Ankara.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.desc: The eerie world of abandoned space age projects, including the HARP gun in Barbados and the mountainside Barcroft Observatory in California.

programme.desc: Once-great triumphs of marine engineering now left to rust include a ship graveyard in Maryland colonised by wildlife, and a Cold War sub.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: 'Conned to Death' covers the murder of Michele MacNeill and how investigators and forensics brought her killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Kelsey Berreth vanishes on Thanksgiving in 2018, blood in her house and cell phone records indicate that there is more to Kelsey's disappearance than meets the eye.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into a body found in a plastic container and how the killer is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The terrifying assault of Ronda Guzman and the investigation that reveals her attacker after 33 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation that reveals the predator responsible for numerous sexual assaults.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: By September 1973, with three murders in just three months, South Wales Police realised they were looking for Wales' first documented serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: 15-year-old Janet Commins was savagely murdered, her body hidden in undergrowth. 40 years later, DNA profiling eventually helped to catch the killer.
programme.sub-title: Unravelling the Murder of Janet Commins

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: After body parts were found in a Dublin city canal, a broad forensic investigation was needed to identify the victim, and lead police to those responsible.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The mutilated bodies of two women sparked a massive police manhunt. With advances in forensic science, investigators brought Ireland's only living serial killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder investigation surrounding the death of a young, defenceless woman led police to another case, where the science of DNA profiling helped to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who identified then murdered his victims, caused a manhunt which lasted nearly three decades. The science of DNA eventually led to his capture.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Beverly Therrien and her two lodgers were found beaten to death and despite the killer's careful planning, investigators identified and linked him to the crime.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Police were called to a crime scene on Koonce Road, close to Calcasieu Parish, Louisiana. Their discovery was truly shocking; a female victim who was beaten beyond recognition.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The tragic murder of Brenda Dupont went unsolved for 28 years until the determined officers involved in the case brought the perpetrator to justice using advanced forensic techniques.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder of Lynette White led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time. Find out how police work and DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm
programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park: All About Mormons
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Butt Out
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park: It's Christmas In Canada
programme.desc: It's Christmas In Canada: A law is passed in Canada, meaning poor lil' Ike must return to his biological parents. The boys set out to stop this but who is the evil mastermind behind the law? (S7, E15)

programme.title: South Park: Good Times with Weapons
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: AWESOM-O: When Cartman disguises himself as a robot in order to play a prank on Butters, he ends up being used by movie execs to come up with film ideas and captured by the military! (S8, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Goobacks
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The Jeffersons: A new family arrive in South Park with a little boy called Blanket, a fairground in the garden and a dad with a penchant for singing and cosmetic surgery. Guess who? Shamone! (S8, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd
programme.desc: Douche and Turd: The pupils of South Park Elementary are called to vote for a new mascot. With the choices being a "giant douche" and a "turd sandwich" is there any point? (S8, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes
programme.desc: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes: When a mall is built in South Park, the townsfolk become addicted to shopping - it'll take the boys hunting down its evil "heart" to end their misery! (S8, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Preschool
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Woodland Critter Christmas
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)
