programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: presented behind-the-scenes footage of Heat D of Robot Wars: The Second Wars, including video diaries of the Razer, Bodyhammer and Elvis teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of Heat E of Robot Wars: The Second Wars, including video diaries of the Technophobic and Killertron teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat F of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Ron and Panic Attack teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of `Robot Wars', see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight teams made up of families and friends from across the country put their homemade robots to the test inside a purpose-built arena, packed with arena hazards and four House Robots. The winner at the end will go forward to the grand-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The huge axe of Robot Thor driven by Jason, a builder from Northampton, clashes with father-and-son team Will and Ian from Team Shockwave. A consultant cardiologist and his two sons cause a huge upset with their brand new untested robot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An eclectic collection of homemade robots including Glitterbomb, designed by nine-year-old April, which comes complete with a huge pink axe. A team of students from Falkirk bring a robot made of wood with a petrol engine.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Former holiday camp bluecoats enter the competition with their `launcher' Apollo. Father and-son-team Kan-Opener have a robot with huge piercing claws. A team of engineering students have created a future tech machine called Sweeney Todd.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Featuring one of the most bizarre, but certainly the tallest robot ever seen on `Robot Wars', Gabriel, built by Mensa member Craig and his three sons. It has wheels as tall as a washing machine and a huge samurai sword.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Winner robots from rounds one through five battle it out in the arena, a wild card from the runners up throws a spanner in the works as it tries to overthrow attempts at glory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A new spinner has something to prove and a family team pour blood, sweat and tears into keeping their robot wars dream alive. The robots compete through brutal group battles and fierce head to heads for a place in the heat final.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Using competitors own video diaries, exclusive action from the pits and the best of the battles, Philippa Forrester will get down to the nuts and bolts of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars'.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Extreme
programme.desc: Craig Charles and Philippa Forrester oversee the mechanical mayhem. Jonathan Pearce supplies his inimitable brand of commentary and in-depth analysis.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat C of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Dreadnaut and Oblivion teams preparing their robots competitors for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: presented behind-the-scenes footage of Heat D of Robot Wars: The Second Wars, including video diaries of the Razer, Bodyhammer and Elvis teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of Heat E of Robot Wars: The Second Wars, including video diaries of the Technophobic and Killertron teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat F of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Ron and Panic Attack teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of `Robot Wars', see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat H of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Sting, Loco and Wizard teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of Heat I of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the King Buxton and All Torque teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Another visit behind the scenes of `Robot Wars' series 2, more exclusive footage as access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of the week's competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight teams made up of families and friends from across the country put their homemade robots to the test inside a purpose-built arena, packed with arena hazards and four House Robots. The winner at the end will go forward to the grand-final.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
programme.desc: As Deborah Utley begins experiencing paranormal events in her home, she turns to her faith for protection. But when her children are targeted by the entity she seeks the aid of paranormal investigators to end the cycle of terror.

programme.title: A Haunting: Portal Of Doom
programme.desc: Anita Intenzo and her son, Chris, encounter the ghost of their recently deceased friend Paul while preparing his house to be sold. Paul warns of a demon attached to an artifact he acquired abroad. The demon invades Anita’s home and all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: A Haunting: Field Of Ghosts
programme.desc: For as long as she can remember, Markie Beason has sensed something horrible happened in her home and becomes frightened to be alone in the house. Her father David, reaches out to a paranormal investigation group in hopes they can bring peace to the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Uninvited
programme.desc: Meriden, Connecticut natives Lynn and Jason Ryder purchase a historic restaurant, thinking it will be an adventure to operate an establishment so much a part of their youth. Little do they know their experience is about to turn into their worst nightmare.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting Of Allen House
programme.desc: Professor Mark Spencer and his wife Rebecca have just purchased the historic Allen House in Arkansas. Shortly after moving in, Rebecca comes face to face with a faceless spirit. Mark calls investigators to determine if the spirit means them harm.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes of the Past
programme.desc: The Johnson’s young daughter reveals that two fairies visit her room each night.

programme.title: A Haunting: Blood Visions
programme.desc: Faced with a supernatural threat, Betty Johnson and her family move hoping to leave their troubles behind. But when Betty’s oldest child starts experiencing bloody visions and is physically attacked, the family realizes "it" has followed them.

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare Upstairs
programme.desc: The VanLandingham family moves to a larger house in the small town of Wynne, Arkansas. What they first consider "house-settling" noise and behavior quickly turns into a full-scale supernatural physical attack on both daughters Brianna and Heather.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge
programme.desc: Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Awakening
programme.desc: Marcy’s son is deployed with the Army. Overcome with worry, a dormant spirits threatens her.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mind Control
programme.desc: When William falls ill, Amanda Morrison's family volunteer to clean his home. But after the family stumbles across satanic objects in the home, strange things start happening. A demonologist cleanses the home and discovers the reason behind the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.desc: 'The Spiders' take on the Eggheads.

programme.title: Eggheads

programme.desc: The 'Thursday Knights' take on the Eggheads.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: Quiz group `What Was My Line?' do their best to take on the Eggheads.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The group `Rose and the White Horse' takes on the Eggheads.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The group named `We Quiz You Not' takes on the Eggheads.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at British killer Dennis Nilsen who was known to dress and watch TV with his victims' corpses. Having crammed human remains into his drains, his crimes were discovered by Dyno-Rod.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The crimes of Ted Bundy, who is believed to have sexually assaulted and bludgeoned to death up to 100 young women in the USA in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between May 2005 and August 2006, Dale and Jeff Hausner, later joined by Samuel Dieteman, turned drive-by shootings into sport, keeping score as they picked off their victims at random and terrorised the residents of Phoenix, Arizona.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Known as `the meanest man in America', Donald Henry Gaskins brutally tortured and killed over 100 people. And, even on Death Row, he managed to commit one final murder.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Ex-marine Cleophus Prince Jr raped and murdered six women in 1990.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The testimony of Dennis Rader, the killer who shocked the peaceful Mid-West folk of Wichita.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Cinema entrepreneur Peter Moore brutally murdered four men in Wales in 1995.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Cinema entrepreneur Peter Moore brutally murdered four men in Wales in 1995.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A young couple from Canada were serial killers capable of severe cruelty. They targeted young women, including a relative of one of the perpetrators, in a series of crimes that would horrify the nation.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Bill Suff's murderous reign of terror spanned 6 years and stole the lives of at least 12 women in California.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at the murders of Richard Ramirez, who slept in cemeteries as a child and later spread terror in LA by killing, and often raping, over 14 victims.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The detectives, attorneys and psychiatrists who tried to unravel the mystery of why so many young people fell under Manson's spell, and how he was able to convince them to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and experts in the field seek clues as to what prompted the awful crimes carried out by Beverley Allitt.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Childhood friends John Duffy and David Mulcahy murder several women in London.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Tony Costa murdered four women in 1969, before penning an unpublished novel detailing his crimes.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: This edition reviews the case of Levi Bellfield who murdered three women, including Milly Dowler.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Over a six month period, Colin Ireland lured five gay men to their deaths. As the media whipped up a frenzy of fear proclaiming that a `Gay Slayer' was loose on the streets of London, Ireland continued to taunt the detectives trying to catch him.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Examining the chilling case of Sean Gillis who stalked, raped and brutally murdered eight women.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Examining the `Highway Hooker', a female serial killer and prostitute sentenced to death by lethal injection for the killing of six men in Florida between 1989 and 1990.

programme.title: Carve Her Name With Pride
programme.desc: The valiant World War II French resistance fighter Violette Szabo sacrifices everything for her cause.

programme.title: A Challenge for Robin Hood
programme.desc: Robin and his Merry Men set out to dethrone a self-appointed dictator who has seized power over the commoners.

programme.title: Dangerous Exile
programme.desc: A French duke saves Louis XVI's son during the Reign of Terror and hides him with a woman in Wales.

programme.title: Conspiracy of Hearts
programme.desc: A group of nuns at a convent during World War II help Jewish children escape from a Nazi transit camp.

programme.title: Caesar and Cleopatra
programme.desc: The Roman conqueror Julius Caesar takes over the Egyptian city of Alexandria, and inherits a problem: Cleopatra and her brother are to rule the country together, so Caesar takes Cleopatra under his wing, mentoring her in the uses of political power.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, is in mourning for his dead father, the king. He's also disturbed by how quickly his mother, Gertrude, has remarried.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: The ill-fated romance of Horatio Lord Nelson and Emma Hamilton, wife of the British Ambassador to Naples. Made during WWII, the film was clearly meant to raise the morale of British audiences and was said to have been Churchill's favourite film.

programme.title: Secret People
programme.desc: Maria meets an old love, Louis, who has become a radical and currently plots to assassinate a world leader. Louis uses Maria to enter London and then convinces her to begrudgingly join their terrorist group.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Husband or Lover Father My Kids?
programme.desc: Is Jesus the father of Laicie’s baby? Dusti says he’s gay and sex with Kayla was an “experiment”, but did he father her child? Is Rick or Jesse the father of Jolene’s baby?
programme.sub-title: Did My Husband or Lover Father My Kids?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?
programme.desc: Sherry has a shocking secret to tell her boyfriend. But the secret involves his childhood best friend. Jen says that her husband is a cheater and has proof! Will these relationships survive?
programme.sub-title: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated... Our Kids May Not Be Yours!
programme.desc: Two steaming grandmothers want to sort out their children's paternity mystery. Then, Ben is sure that Angela's child is his. Teen mom Melissa wants Izzy to admit he's the dad and support her!
programme.sub-title: I Cheated... Our Kids May Not Be Yours!

programme.title: The Maury Show: They're Back: Feuding Family Updates!
programme.desc: Some of our wildest guests return to give us some updates. Did the DNA results force these denying dads to step up? Did the lie detector results force these cheaters to become faithful?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With Your Family and 97 Women
programme.desc: These women are sure their lovers are cheating. Will these men be able to talk their way out of being busted on hidden camera?
programme.sub-title: I Cheated With Your Family and 97 Women

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Babies 5 DNA Tests. Is He The Father?
programme.desc: Today on Maury, we've got steaming mad mommas and daddies in denial. But could some of these men be right? What if they really aren't the father? Only Maury has the answers!
programme.sub-title: 5 Babies 5 DNA Tests. Is He The Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: We'll Prove You're My Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: Kreisha and Jonathan's mom wants to prove to him that he fathered her baby. Plus, Brooke and Wade's relationship began as a teenage romance, but ends with a paternity test!
programme.sub-title: We'll Prove You're My Baby's Dad!

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Kelly was adopted as a child and, while searching for her birth family, came across a woman who could be her biological sister; Sadie says that her boyfriend, Todd, has cheated on her, and he doubts the paternity of their 2-year-old son.
programme.sub-title: 47 Years ... Are We Sisters?; DNA & Unlock: Decade of Deception?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Chanell caught her fiancé Chris talking to sex workers, but he vowed to never do it again. But a few weeks later, she caught him cheating. Next, Katrina wants to find out why her husband, Elijah, runs to his ex everytime they have a disagreement.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: My Fianc' Sabotaged Me! / Unlock: Your Ex Told Me Everything

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Kaitlyn, adopted at age 6, recently messaged a man who could potentially be her father; Tia received a message from another woman claiming to be her fianc''s side chick.
programme.sub-title: DNA: I Was Kept Away From You; Unlock Your Phone or We're Done

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Brandi seeks to get to the bottom of a long and convoluted DNA quagmire in hopes of finding out who her father is. Her potential siblings, Brian and Tarrica, care for Brandi but aren't certain if they are related.
programme.sub-title: DNA Mystery: Does A 32-Year Search End?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Imani and her child's father, took part in a threesome with another woman. But he started seeing that woman behind her back. Next, Zy'Tajia was willing to pay for her boyfriend Larone's cell phone bill, but found risky texts on his phone.
programme.sub-title: You Got My Bff Pregnant! / Unlock: You Lie and Bully Me

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Anthony wants David to pay over $1300 in rent and belongings he claims David trashed.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: When Paul's expensive remote control helicopter "disappears" from Sean's consignment shop, Paul claims foul play.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Juana is suing Jorge after the bird he sold her died after 3 hours, she wants her money back for the bird and autopsy.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Jennifer is accusing Michelle of causing the car crash and is suing her for the damages to her car.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Sabrina is suing her child's father after claiming he threw a man-tantrum and broke their son's tablet.
programme.sub-title: Did a Dad's Punishment Go Too Far?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Where Did My Man Learn New Sex Moves?
programme.desc: Has pregnant Kazia's fiancé been cheating on her and selling his body? Then, has Deanna been cheating on Manny? Who fathered her child?
programme.sub-title: Where Did My Man Learn New Sex Moves?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Fiance Sleep With My Uncle for Money?
programme.desc: Did Ray cheat on Ashley while she was pregnant with his baby and have a secret threesome? Then, is Jason's fiancé Tasha sleeping with his own uncle Sonny for money?
programme.sub-title: Did My Fiance Sleep With My Uncle for Money?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 3 Mad Moms... 4 Babies... Is Aaron the Dad?
programme.desc: Travis swears that Crystal cheated and denies their daughter. Shamika's fiancée wants him to take a DNA test to prove that he fathered their three kids!
programme.sub-title: 3 Mad Moms... 4 Babies... Is Aaron the Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Who's the Father of My 4 Kids... My Husband or My Lover?
programme.desc: Brian, his mother, and sister say that he didn't father Sarah's kid! Alicia cheated and doesn't know who her baby's father is! Two grandmas square off over a messy paternity feud!
programme.sub-title: Who's the Father of My 4 Kids... My Husband or My Lover?

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: A 40-tonne lorry careers off the M1 and plunges down an embankment into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: On the M11, a loaded truck is marooned after a rear axle collapsed while at full speed.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: In Northumberland, a 32-tonne tipper gets lost in the dark and ends up stuck in a field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Kevin is called to a challenging recovery: a 75-tonne crane stranded in the countryside.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Vehicles in need of recovery include a Land Rover Discovery dumped in a canal.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: Just outside Newcastle, Kev is sent to rescue a wheelie bin delivery truck that is stuck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, rookie op Euan is tasked with rescuing a ten-tonne rigid.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A toppled tanker loaded with liquid chicken guts needs rescuing.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A fuel tanker has rolled down a steep, muddy hill and must be flipped over.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Recovery op Steve must deal with a mattress-stuffed lorry which has hit a low bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A three-tonne passenger ferry is hauled out of the icy waters of a lake for repairs,

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Recovery op Mark tackles a Vauxhall left dangling over the edge of a narrow canal lock.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: In Croydon, Stu has a complex recovery: a bin lorry is stuck in deep mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A fully loaded 26-tonne tanker gets stuck in a waterlogged verge on the busy A5.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Two coaches which tried passing each other on a narrow snowy lane come to grief.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Kevin is winching a tanker which is leaning perilously close to an ancient wall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Rescuing a burnt-out low loader and portacabin and a bus blocking a mini roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Steve tackles an emergency when a lorry deposits a hazardous load.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 46-tonne artic has veered into a verge on a busy road and is going nowhere without help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Punk Frogs
programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Neutrino teens Kala, Zak and Eask arrive on Earth and alert the Turtles to Shredder's latest plan to make "mindless zombies" of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Catwoman from Channel 6
programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome
programme.desc: To bring the Technodrome back to Earth, Shredder is instructed to take over the Niagara Falls hydroelectric station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beneath These Streets
programme.desc: While the Turtles, in disguise, are at a movie, Shredder interrupts a press conference to steal a new medi-laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the 50-Foot Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are planning Irma's birthday party, Shredder steals an Exaboron Isotope from a meteorite crash. Krang creates an Exaboron-powered Enlarging Ray which causes six times normal growth, with the intention of using it on Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Maltese Hamster
programme.desc: Shredder gives futuristic laser weapons to mobster Tony Vivaldi and his underlings. Shredder wants to find the Maltese Hamster statue of him, which has inside it the formula for ultimate fuel for the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sky Turtles
programme.desc: Krang creates a Gravity Altering Device which causes everyone in the city, including the Turtles, to start floating.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Old Switcheroo
programme.desc: Two huge electrodes at Cybertech Labs produce a startling effect on two long-time foes. The mind of the Turtles master Splinter winds up in the body of the evil Shredder - and vice versa, causing confusion among their associates.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Burne's Blues
programme.desc: Burne is out to prove to April that he can still dig in the trenches and find good stories after deriding her for failing to come up with anything good lately.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Fifth Turtle
programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King
programme.desc: April does a story on the rat problem the city is facing, and the Rat King kidnaps her. The Rat King is the leader of all the rats under his form of government known as the Ratocracy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): 20,000 Leaks Under the City
programme.desc: Krang is out to liquidate the Turtles by pumping water through the Earth's crust and into the sewer system. The super pump starts sucking up the entire ocean and soon the streets are covered with three feet of water.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles
programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Turtle Snatchers
programme.desc: Donatello and Rocksteady are beamed up to a space ship - by little alien, Nikto, six thousand years old, traveling with his parents Klaatu and Barada.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Camera Bugged
programme.desc: The polarisoid, an alien tourist visiting Earth, causes all sorts of commotion with his camera which sucks everything it photos literally inside the camera, including City Hall.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Green with Jealousy
programme.desc: In order to steal nuclear energy from a submarine, Krang creates a love potion which induces lovesickness in all of the Turtles - except Donatello, who does not eat the potion-laced pizza.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of the Fly
programme.desc: Intent on revenge against both the Turtles, Krang and Shredder, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) returns with a bug of a plan. While the Turtles are battling Shredder, the insect tries to exterminate the entire group!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono

programme.sub-title: The Case of the Hot Kimono

programme.desc: Sophie visits Charlotte for advice, Holly visits Charlotte Dawson and gets fired up. Aaron and Talia visit her family. Marnie gets a visit from her wedding planner who brings bad news. (S4, ep4)

programme.desc: Aaron's worried when Talia has to stay in hospital. Sophie embraces single life and Holly's pleased when Jacob meets an Ex-Pro to talk about life after football. (S4, ep8)

programme.desc: Maddox is home but Talia's struggling post C-Section. Sophie invests in her own beauty business. Marnie's dream house move might be back on and Government travel restrictions impact Holly. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: With the house reduced to carnage and Sophie losing even more faith in boyfriend Joel, there are still plenty of beaches to party on. Meanwhile Holly ups her game in the pursuit of James. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Sophie is elated as Joel surprises her with a visit. But will he be able to behave himself? And with everyone fearing that his worldie mission may now be over, Holly moves in on her prey. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore

programme.desc: Vicky and Ricci return to the house in time for Becca's birthday which goes off in usual Geordie style. Sophie sends Joel back to England, but it's not long before she regrets the decision. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore

programme.title: Geordie Shore

programme.desc: In Uganda, openly gay David Kato and his fellow activists work to defeat new legislation in their country that would make homosexuality punishable by death.

programme.title: Mr. World 2019
programme.desc: Presenting the tenth edition of the Mister World competition, held on 23 August 2019 at the Smart Araneta Coliseum in Quezon City, the Philippines.

programme.title: Crazy for Madonna
programme.desc: Exploring the professional career and personal life of the Queen of Pop and Hollywood Star, Madonna, featuring interviews with showbiz personalities.

programme.title: Mixed Messages
programme.desc: Ren is on the hunt for romance, but in a world of tinder and zero commitment, getting lucky has never been harder.

programme.title: My Life Is a Telenovela
programme.desc: An ambush on the red carpet forces Raquenel to strike back. Meanwhile, Sissi seduces Gustavo, while Enrique brings Raquenel to see a psychic.

programme.title: F***ing Adelaide
programme.desc: Toby tries to help Emma relax and is tasked with fixing the back fence. As he tries to avoid the continuing family drama about the sale of the house, he starts to wonder if Adelaide is where he truly belongs.

programme.title: The Pam Ann Show
programme.desc: International air hostess Pam Ann hosts a very turbulent variety show.

programme.title: My Life Is a Telenovela
programme.desc: An ambush on the red carpet forces Raquenel to strike back. Meanwhile, Sissi seduces Gustavo, while Enrique brings Raquenel to see a psychic.

programme.title: OUTmusic
programme.desc: The best LGBTQ+ artists, the hottest video clips, and all your favourite music in one spot!

programme.title: OUTmusic
programme.desc: The best LGBTQ+ artists, the hottest video clips, and all your favourite music in one spot!

programme.title: OUTshorts
programme.desc: A selection of Queer short films, featuring entertaining stories and inspiring documentaries.

programme.title: OUTmusic Classic
programme.desc: The best classic artists, the most groundbreaking music videos and greatest music, all in the same place.

programme.title: OUTmusic Classic

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Couples Hang, Tuna Transfer
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under helicopters. In another, each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Double Eat & Yank, Gross Catapult
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, the contestants will stand at a podium on the roof of a 5 story building. The first contestant loads a piece of cow stomach onto a catapult, which will then launch the stomach down to their partner.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Blind Driving Race To Truck,Double Tunnel Flush
programme.desc: A male contestant's head is placed through a hole cut into the bottom of a slightly angled sewer pipe with his arms shackled around the outside of the pipe, among other exciting stunts.
programme.sub-title: Blind Driving Race To Truck,Double Tunnel Flush

programme.title: Fear Factor: Weighted Ski Boot Rescue, Block Head
programme.desc: Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads will be placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats. In another stunt, one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above water wearing weighted boots.
programme.sub-title: Weighted Ski Boot Rescue, Block Head

programme.title: Fear Factor: Fear Factor Triathlon, Electric Maze
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Train Lean and Grab, Gross Gorge
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, each contestant will stand on a beam suspended in the air off the sides of a train box car. Then, in a banquet room, couples will feed each other as much disgusting food as they can.
programme.sub-title: Train Lean and Grab, Gross Gorge

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat Helicopter Truck Car Jump,Bullfrog Coffin
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will ride on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. The male contestant will be placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.
programme.sub-title: Boat Helicopter Truck Car Jump,Bullfrog Coffin

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Soft baits wreak havoc at Okiwi Bay before a cod-focused adventure at D’Urville Island’s north end.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Turbulent tidal flows and whirlpools provide challenging conditions at French Pass, but big snapper await.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Monster trout and wild venison hunts in the dramatic landscape of South Westland.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Fishing and diving among the pristine waters and marine life at the Mokohinau Islands.
programme.sub-title: A Day at the Mokohinau Islands

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Back to Kaikoura for diving and fishing along one of Graeme’s favourite coastlines.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Captain Bucko guides a thrilling kingfish hunt in the scenic Bay of Islands, showcasing pristine waters and a wealth of marine life in a true angling paradise.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Diving for mussels and scallops near Rakino before setting up for a fresh snapper catch makes this a well-rounded ocean-to-plate experience.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Hoki trawlers, commercial insights, and massive Pacific bluefin tuna highlight this intense two-part adventure on New Zealand's wild West Coast.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Following up on the Hoki trawler story, this second part continues the chase for record-breaking tuna in icy, dramatic South Island waters.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Testing a new underwater camera leads to epic footage as Sandee lands a monster snapper and Jackson spears a kingfish near Little Barrier.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: How easy is it to hook a shark from the beach? Find out as the team braves summer surfcasting to show sharks are just a cast away.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Great Barrier Island sees two teams compete—one by boat, one from shore—as they reel in big snapper and serve up tales as tall as the catch.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: The Motuhie Channel delivers big snapper bites right near Auckland. A reminder that top-tier fishing can be just around the corner.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Cape Brett delivers an underwater spectacle with a rich reef scene and plenty of pink mao mao and snapper action above the surface.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: John Bennett leads an Antarctic expedition for toothfish, culminating in the historic capture of the world’s largest colossal squid.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Part two of the Antarctic adventure delves deeper into the icy wilderness for more epic catches and frozen feats with John Bennett.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Two soft bait experts reveal gear and technique tips in a day of snapper fishing packed with practical advice and action.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Scuba diving and soft baiting at Mokohinau Islands make this a dreamy blend of marine exploration and snapper excitement.

programme.title: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Targeting grouper, blue cod and crayfish just north of Christchurch with Dorado Charters in Motunau.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Rope Transfer,Tumbler Cage,Gross Obstacle Course,Up & Over Car Ramp
programme.desc: A rope will be suspended between two helicopters. Contestants will be standing in a tall cage. Contestants must discover a key to a box of worms', which will be transferred onto a scale.
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Rope Transfer,Tumbler Cage,Gross Obstacle Course,Up & Over Car Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submerged Car Rotisserie, Fear Factor Sushi Bar, Wall Sweeper
programme.desc: Contestant is locked by their waist to the drivers seat and wrist to the steering wheel. Contestants determine the quantity and variety of Fear Factor Sushi they will have to eat. A six-inch wide beam will be sticking out perpendicular from a roof top.
programme.sub-title: Submerged Car Rotisserie, Fear Factor Sushi Bar, Wall Sweeper

programme.title: JAG: War Cries
programme.desc: In Lima, Peru, while a boy sneaks into the US embassy at night, a Marine guard stops him.

programme.title: JAG: Sightings
programme.desc: In south Texas, residents have reported strange phenomena, stories of supernatural events have abounded, and a 10-year-old girl has disappeared.

programme.title: JAG: Scimitar
programme.desc: Two Marines in a Humvee mistakenly drive into Iraq; an Iraqi detail intercepts them, kills one, and captures the other.

programme.title: JAG: Defensive Action
programme.desc: A patrolling F-14 malfunctions in a no-fly zone; the crew ejects, and the bird explodes.

programme.title: JAG: Boot.
programme.desc: A woman Marine recruit dies at Parris Island. Harm investigates while Meg poses undercover as a recruit.

programme.title: JAG: The Brotherhood
programme.desc: During a landing exercise Marines find a beaten, comatose fellow Marine on the beach

programme.title: JAG: Hemlock
programme.desc: By mistake a foreign agent sends a fax to Meg's office; then he retrieves it and shoots Meg to prevent her from identifying him

programme.title: JAG: High Ground
programme.desc: A Marine sniper receives orders contrary to a previous deal; his CO refuses to listen; the sniper takes a shot at the CO's Humvee.

programme.title: JAG: Smoked
programme.desc: After a lightning strike, an F-14 wanders into Cuban airspace, and Cuban fighters force it to land

programme.title: JAG: Black Ops
programme.desc: A Naval aviator, while temporarily assigned to a SEAL team, drowns at sea; he was the son of a woman senator.

programme.title: JAG: Survivors
programme.desc: In a civilian court Harm represents a divorced (and emotionally baffled) Marine colonel, who has gotten into trouble over an unauthorized visit with his minor son.

programme.title: JAG: Recovery
programme.desc: A Navy astronaut dies during a drill while preparing for a space mission to repair a satellite

programme.title: JAG: Prisoner
programme.desc: Chicom agents capture Harm in Hong Kong; they vigorously question him in mainland China about official matters.

programme.title: JAG: Ares
programme.desc: Someone kills a Naval officer on Okinawa, then his ship encounters major trouble during war games at sea

programme.title: JAG: Skeleton Crew
programme.desc: The body of a woman Naval officer, a friend, and classmate of Harm, is found ashore.

programme.title: JAG: Trinity
programme.desc: Harm and his new partner, Marine Major Sara MacKenzie are drawn into a game of revenge when they're sent to Belfast, Ireland, to represent the legal interests of a Navy Lieutenant whose infant son has seemingly been abducted.

programme.title: JAG: Secrets
programme.desc: Admiral Chegwidden, Mac and Bud Roberts are taken hostage in the Admiral's office by Pvt. Magida, a Marine who escaped from a nearby Federal prison.

programme.title: JAG: Ghosts
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate an attempt on Admiral Chedwiggen's life and uncover the fact that all the members of his former SEAL team have died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: JAG: Full Engagement
programme.desc: While on their day off, Harm takes Mac for a flight in his vintage airplane, only to be forced to make an emergency landing in a mountain clearing because of mechanical problems.

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS: Rocks in my Socks
programme.desc: Deputies discover a purse and a sock containing paraphernalia during an arrest. Deputies pursue an intoxicated motorcyclist. A woman is suspected of stealing a cake.

programme.title: COPS: Mean Girls Times Two
programme.desc: Deputies are forced to taser a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS: Cops What's in the Box
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop leads to a foot chase, a driver found with meth narcs on his passenger who has warrants, and a 17-year-old is caught driving without a permit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS: Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: COPS: Get a Room
programme.desc: A man claims to be protecting the car he broke into. Officers are called to when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor's door.

programme.title: COPS: Time to Climb
programme.desc: A couple flee a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman goes to great lengths to hide her daughter, a couple's glovebox holds a surprise, and an Uber driver gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Carjacked Up
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS: Candlelight Burglar
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter's boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.

programme.title: COPS: Wardrobe Clash
programme.desc: A homeless man hides from deputies in the closet of an empty house. Deputies arrive to a domestic disturbance to find two brothers fighting over a pair of sandals.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is apprehended after trying to evade arrest, a convicted felon is detained when police make some illegal discoveries in his van, and deputies seize a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.
programme.sub-title: Cops The Young and the Reckless

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man's effort to evade units goes up in flames, officers use a beanbag gun on an armed suspect, and deputies intervene in a couple's grocery dispute.

programme.title: COPS: Alleycat
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: COPS: Skipping Rocks
programme.desc: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Hong Kong Cruise: Polly'S Poker Palace - Part 1
programme.desc: On a Hong Kong cruise: a senator romances a woman until he learns the nature of her visit; two brothers date Julie and Vicki; a compulsive shopper is offered $25,000 by her husband (Herb Edelman) if she'll resist temptation during the trip.
programme.sub-title: Hong Kong Cruise: Polly'S Poker Palace - Part 1

programme.title: The Love Boat: Hong Kong Cruise: Polly'S Poker Palace - Part 2
programme.desc: An international fugitive finds love when he meets a beautiful woman with a secret, while a divorcee meets an intriguing man who conceals his identity from her and Isaac.
programme.sub-title: Hong Kong Cruise: Polly'S Poker Palace - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: China Cruise: The Pledge/ East Meets West/ Dear Roberta/ My Two Dumplings - Part 2
programme.desc: A rich widow comes face to face with her estranged sister, who's working on the ship as a made and whose boyfriend the wealthy woman stole and married 40 years earlier. Meanwhile, a childless couple hatches a plan to become parents.
programme.sub-title: China Cruise: The Pledge/ East Meets West/ Dear Roberta/ My Two Dumplings - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: When World's Collide/ Captain And The Geisha/ The Lottery Winners/ The Emperor's Fortune - Part 2
programme.desc: A man bound by alimony wants to make sure his ex (Michelle Phillips) goes through with her marriage; Julie's Aunt Sylvia and her pal Betsy try to interest a publisher in Betsy's memoirs.
programme.sub-title: When World's Collide/ Captain And The Geisha/ The Lottery Winners/ The Emperor's Fortune - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: How Do I Love Thee...?/ No More Alimony/ Authoress! Authoress!
programme.desc: Isaac's budding relationship with a new crew member becomes complicated when Gopher tells him to fire her. Meanwhile, a congressman and his wife bring their daughter aboard the Pacific Princess after receiving letters threatening her young life.
programme.sub-title: How Do I Love Thee...?/ No More Alimony/ Authoress! Authoress!

programme.title: The Love Boat: Best Ex-Friends/ All The Congressman's Women/ Three Faces Of Love
programme.desc: A gambling cruise for charity proves a chancy thing for a teacher (McLean Stevenson), two honeymooners (Shea Farrell, Leah Ayres), and the drive chairwoman (Celeste Holm). Richard Jaeckel, Antony Ponzini, Jo Ann Pflug, Gavin MacLeod.
programme.sub-title: Best Ex-Friends/ All The Congressman's Women/ Three Faces Of Love

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ace In The Hole/ Uncle Joey's Song/ Father In The Cradle
programme.desc: Captain Stubing hires a handsome new photographer who draws the attention of two sisters who were visiting Doc and Gopher. Then, a young man is shocked to meet his mother's (Lee Meriwether) new boyfriend, who is the same age as him.
programme.sub-title: Ace In The Hole/ Uncle Joey's Song/ Father In The Cradle

programme.title: The Love Boat: A Rose Is Not A Rose / Novelties / Too Rich And Too Thin
programme.desc: An inventor's zealousness jeopardizes his chance for romance and a man's double identity upsets Julie and a passenger.
programme.sub-title: A Rose Is Not A Rose / Novelties / Too Rich And Too Thin

programme.title: The Love Boat: Side By Side/ A Fish Out Of Water/ Rub Me Tender
programme.desc: A boy who thinks his grandmother (Glynis Johns) is terminally ill will do anything to ensure her happiness; a man (Ed Begley Jr.) who's uncomfortable around women falls in love with a mermaid (Mary Crosby).
programme.sub-title: Side By Side/ A Fish Out Of Water/ Rub Me Tender

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Show: Santa, Santa, Santa/ Another Dog Gone Christmas/ Noel's Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A bevy of beauties, including a stunning new cruise director, board the Pacific Princess for an all-woman voyage to Alaska.
programme.sub-title: The Christmas Show: Santa, Santa, Santa/ Another Dog Gone Christmas/ Noel's Christmas Carol

programme.title: The Love Boat: Copenhagen/Amsterdam Cruise/ Vicki and the Fugitive - Part 1
programme.desc: Mystery abounds when a woman becomes friendly with a man she knew in a past life but he doesn't remember her. At the same time, Captain Stubing pursues a beautiful passenger who seems intent on avoiding him.
programme.sub-title: Copenhagen/Amsterdam Cruise/ Vicki and the Fugitive - Part 1

programme.title: The Love Boat: Copenhagen/Amsterdam Cruise/ Vicki and the Fugitive - Part 2
programme.desc: Isaac tries to help a recently widowed woman and her son cope with their grief and a sightless woman believes she has found her former love.
programme.sub-title: Copenhagen/Amsterdam Cruise/ Vicki and the Fugitive - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Only The Good Die Young/ Honey Beats The Odds/ The Light Of Another Day
programme.desc: A dying woman meets a man who claims he is in a debate with an angel and a woman from Gopher's past hopes that he will propose to her.
programme.sub-title: Only The Good Die Young/ Honey Beats The Odds/ The Light Of Another Day

programme.title: The Love Boat: Soap Gets In Your Eyes/ A Match Made In Heaven/ Tugs Of The Heart
programme.desc: On her 18th birthday, Vicki learns that her father is a recovering alcoholic and a woman hires a detective to find her college sweetheart.
programme.sub-title: Soap Gets In Your Eyes/ A Match Made In Heaven/ Tugs Of The Heart

programme.title: The Love Boat: And One To Grow On/ Seems Like Old Times/ I'll Never Forget What's Her Name
programme.desc: April Lopez (Charo) returns and gets the crew bent out of shape while two women complicate a wager between brothers.
programme.sub-title: And One To Grow On/ Seems Like Old Times/ I'll Never Forget What's Her Name

programme.title: The Love Boat: Aerobic April/ The Wager/ Story Of The Century
programme.desc: Doc's plans for romance with a beautiful woman are ruined by his ex-wife's fiance and Judy's newly divorced friend shares a secret.
programme.sub-title: Aerobic April/ The Wager/ Story Of The Century

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Last Heist/ Starting Over/ Watching The Master
programme.desc: Gopher and Isaac think that Judy's love interest has a shady past and a consumer advocate does not approve of his wife's business ventures.
programme.sub-title: The Last Heist/ Starting Over/ Watching The Master

programme.title: Melrose Place: Devil with the G-String
programme.desc: Amanda is furious when Jake skips work to hold a bedside vigil for Jo. Jo is not seriously injured and learns that her baby was unharmed. Billy warns Alison to keep quiet about Amanda's rendezvous with Chas.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Till Death Do Us Part, Part 1& 2
programme.desc: Jo is certain that Amanda will not gracefully bow out of her relationship with Jake. Hillary refuses to believe that Chas tried to seduce Amanda. Chas files a $10 million sexual harassment suit against Amanda, and the agency does not support her.
programme.sub-title: Till Death Do Us Part, Part 1& 2

programme.title: Melrose Place: I Am Curious Melrose
programme.desc: Michael survives the hit-and-run but suffers from amnesia. Jane is released when she offers evidence that incriminates Sydney. Kimberly promises to serve as Syd's alibi.

programme.title: Melrose Place: It's A Bad World After All
programme.desc: Kimberly brings Michael home from the hospital. Sydney convinces Matt to visit her in prison and tells him that Kimberly is setting her up. Sydney's father flies in from Chicago but enrages his daughter by suggesting she seek a plea bargain.
programme.sub-title: It's A Bad World After All

programme.title: Melrose Place: Inlaws and Outlaws
programme.desc: Chris warns that his company will have to cancel his deal with Jane's firm if Michael does not sign off on it. Sydney calls Matt from the mental hospital and pleads with him to investigate Kimberly.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Grand Delusions
programme.desc: Sydney (claiming to be someone named Miranda) hangs around the beach house and attempts to seduce Michael. Michael regains his memory when he is nearly struck by a car in a restaurant parking lot, but doesn't immediately reveal this.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Non-Sexual Healing
programme.desc: Jake's friends (especially Jo and Amanda) are shocked to learn that the Pretty Lady has exploded. The Coast Guard finds Jake clinging for life to a buoy, and he returns to the building safely.

programme.title: Melrose Place: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: Jo and Amanda argue over who is to blame for Jake's departure. Jake meets his biological father, Vince Connors. After they resolve some of their differences, Vince convinces Jake to return to Melrose.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Crook, The Creep, His Lover and Her Sister
programme.desc: Jake uses his reward money to purchase Shooters. When Jake drops off some papers at the design firm, Chris mistakes him for a deliveryman and makes a lewd comment about Sydney.
programme.sub-title: The Crook, The Creep, His Lover and Her Sister

programme.title: Melrose Place: Love Reeks
programme.desc: Jake provides Sydney with refuge after learning of the attack. Amanda reveals that Jane and Chris have gone to Las Vegas, and Sydney realizes that Chris is planning to make good on his promise to marry Jane.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Dr. Jekyll Saves His Hide
programme.desc: Sydney plans to leave town to avoid her problems with Chris, but Jake convinces her to stay and give their relationship a chance. Alison claims to have accepted Billy's relationship with Susan but begins hitting the bottle.

programme.title: Melrose Place: And Justice for None
programme.desc: The trial to determine custody of Jo's baby begins. The Carters' attorney raises many doubts about the character of Jo's friends and neighbors, but Jo shines on the stand.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Days of Wine and Vodka
programme.desc: Zack encourages Alison to buy an expensive new car and skip work. Billy and Susan confront Alison during Thanksgiving dinner, but she reacts angrily and storms out.
programme.sub-title: The Days of Wine and Vodka

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Doctor That Rocks the Cradle
programme.desc: Alison is arrested for driving under the influence. She turns to Billy for comfort when Zack neglects her, but Billy reaffirms his relationship with Susan.
programme.sub-title: The Doctor That Rocks the Cradle

programme.title: Melrose Place: Just Say No
programme.desc: Bruce learns that D&D has been purchased by a consortium of doctors. Peter fires Bruce and appoints Amanda president. Amanda gives Billy a promotion and orders him to fire Alison, who has begun to experience blackouts.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Sex Drugs and Rockin the Cradle
programme.desc: Alison clashes with a man in her group meeting, NFL quarterback Terry Parsons. When Billy fails to show for a meeting featuring loved ones, Alison sneaks out to a bar and gets hammered.
programme.sub-title: Sex Drugs and Rockin the Cradle

programme.title: Melrose Place: Holiday On Ice
programme.desc: Amanda is forced to confront her Scrooge-like behavior when Bruce appears to her in a dream and leads her in a version of The Christmas Carol.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Bye, Bye Baby
programme.desc: Peter hires an efficiency expert named Caitlin Mills, who proves to be a headache for Amanda. Alison neglects Billy as her romance with Terry blossoms.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Band Show
programme.desc: Egos soar out of control when Sabrina uses magic to become a rock star.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: My Nightmare The Car
programme.desc: A talking car causes Sabrina a big headache.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Quiz Show
programme.desc: Sabrina realizes the importance of her Quizmaster after she inadvertently gets him fired.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Fear Strikes Up A Conversation
programme.desc: Public speaking seems like a breeze for Sabrina after coming face-to-face with her fears in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Rumor Mill
programme.desc: Gossip flies when Sabrina does witch community service in the Other Realm rumor mill.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: When Teens Collide
programme.desc: When Sabrina switches personalities with Libby, she uses her magic and newly found popularity.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mom vs. Magic (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina faces the most difficult decision of her life when she must choose between her mom and her magic

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Disney World
programme.desc: A school trip to Disneyworld becomes yet another test for Sabrina on the road to her witch's license

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Choice
programme.desc: After her aunts decide to go their separate ways, Sabrina has to choose which of the two should raise her.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Boy Was My Face Red

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Suspicious Minds

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Pom-Pom Incident

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Pancake Madness
programme.desc: An addiction to pancakes threatens to send Sabrina’s life spinning out of control.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Good Will Haunting
programme.desc: Halloween turns truly frightful when a demented doll takes charge of the festivities.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: You Bet Your Family

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: And The Sabrina Goes To

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Christmas Amnesia

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina and The Beast

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Matchmaker

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: What Price Harvey?
programme.desc: Magical ambition shows its dark side when Harvey drops out of school to become an industrial tycoon.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina And The Pirates

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Wedged in his sofa to relieve his aching back, Grizzy baulks at getting up. He designs clever strategies to do everything from a distance, including confiscating the Lemming's radio-controlled toy robot transformer, which he will use as a butler.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The vibrations created by Grizzy's snoring during his nap give the Lemmings an idea for a bouncing game. But when Grizzy changes positions and his snoring stops, the Lemmings must find other sources of vibrations.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy calls upon his fishing instincts to seduce the she-bear, but only succeeds in making a fool of himself. When he sees the Lemmings riding a magnificent wild salmon like rodeo cowboys, he tries to steal theirs.

programme.desc: Cheer bonds with a migrating firefly-like creature, called a Sparklewing, who stows aboard the Cloudseeker.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic

programme.desc: When a spot opens on the council, Mazu applies. Rocky becomes so fixated on helping that he does not stop and think about what he is doing.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Bill realises bravery is doing something you are afraid of to help someone else. When one of Mazu's science experiments backfires, the dinos have to evacuate the den for the night.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus

programme.desc: The dinos discover Marsh can sing lullabies that put dinos to sleep. When Rocky sees all the attention the babies give to Giganto, he gets jealous and tries to become the centre of attention again.

programme.desc: Bill harvests cycad leaves the Bill Way. The dinos are excited to see the Empress butterflies as they pass by but when Rocky throws them off course they are in trouble.

programme.desc: When word of a monster reaches the dinos, Mazu is determined to find it; when the raptors swipe pies from the dinos, they get more than they expected when they swipe Leena too.

programme.desc: Mazu decides to open a rock museum so everyone can enjoy the treasures. When Bill gives Archie a ride in a helicopter, Archie doesn't want to stop, even when it's Missy's turn.

programme.desc: When Marsh wins the raffle for being a wise dinosaur, Mazu isn't sure he's a good pick. When Mazu gets called away from the lookout, her besties take over her job and try their best to imitate her.

programme.desc: Rosie has a herbarium and Bear has a collection of rare stamps. Masha wants to collect something, but she just cannot figure out what exactly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear is going on a romantic date with the Female Bear. The picnic promises to be perfect because all there are fragrant lilacs all around.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.desc: Bear has a problem: his garden has been overtaken by dandelions. As Bear tries to fight against the weeds, Masha doesn't understand why he is throwing them away. After all, dandelions can be beautiful!

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
